AUTD3 Developers Manual v30.0.1

AUTD3„Āę„Ā§„ĀĄ„Ā¶

AUTD3„ĀĮÁ©ļšł≠Ťß¶Ť¶öÁĒ®Ť∂Öťü≥ś≥Ę„Éē„āß„Éľ„āļ„ÉČ„āĘ„É¨„ā§„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„Āß„Āā„āč. Ť∂Öťü≥ś≥Ę„Éē„āß„Éľ„āļ„ÉČ„āĘ„É¨„ā§„Ā®„ĀĮ, šĹćÁõł„āíŚÄčŚą•„ĀęŚą∂Śĺ°„Āß„Āć„āčŤ∂Öťü≥ś≥ĘśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„āí (ŚÖłŚěčÁöĄ„Āę„ĀĮś†ľŚ≠źÁä∂„Āę) ťÖćŚąó„Āó„Āü„āā„Āģ„Āß„Āā„āč. Ť∂Öťü≥ś≥Ę„ĀģšĹćÁõł„āíŚą∂Śĺ°„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®„Āß, Á©ļťĖď„ĀęšĽĽśĄŹ„Āģťü≥Ś†ī„āíÁôļÁĒü„Āē„Āõ„āč„Āď„Ā®„ĀĆ„Āß„Āć„āč.

„Éē„āß„Éľ„āļ„ÉČ„āĘ„É¨„ā§„āíÁĒ®„ĀĄ„Ā¶ŚćĀŚąÜ„ĀęťõÜśĚü„Āē„Āõ„Āüťü≥ś≥Ę„Āģ„ā®„Éć„Éę„āģ„Éľ„ĀĮ, ťü≥ťüŅśĒĺŚįĄŚúß„āíÁĒü„Āė„āč. „Āď„ĀģŚúßŚäõ„āíŚą©ÁĒ®„Āó„Ā¶, šļļšĹď„ĀģŤ°®ťĚĘ„āíťĚěśé•Ťß¶„Āßśäľ„Āô„Āď„Ā®„ĀĆ„Āß„Āć„āč. ťõÜśĚüÁĄ¶ÁāĻ„ĀģšĹćÁĹģ„ĀĮ, „Éē„āß„Éľ„āļ„ÉČ„āĘ„É¨„ā§„āíťõĽŚ≠źÁöĄ„ĀęŚą∂Śĺ°„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®„ĀßŤá™ÁĒĪ„ĀęŚą∂Śĺ°„Āß„Āć„āč. „Āĺ„Āü, ťÄÜŚēŹť°Ć„āíŤß£„ĀŹ„Āď„Ā®„Āß, ŚćėšłÄ„ĀģÁĄ¶ÁāĻ„Ā†„ĀĎ„Āß„Ā™„ĀŹ, „āą„āäŤ§áťõĎ„Ā™ťü≥ŚúßÁ©ļťĖďŚąÜŚłÉ„āíšĹú„āč„Āď„Ā®„āā„Āß„Āć„āč.

„Éē„āß„Éľ„āļ„ÉČ„āĘ„É¨„ā§„ĀßÁĒüśąź„Āß„Āć„āčŚúßŚäõ„ĀģŚ§ß„Āć„Āē„Āģšłäťôź„ĀĮ, ÁŹĺŚú®„Āģ„Ā®„Āď„āćÁīĄ50mN/cm2‚ąľ5gf/cm2„Āß„Āā„āč. „Āĺ„Āü, Á©ļťĖďŚąÜŤß£ŤÉĹ„ĀĮšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āčś≥Ęťē∑Á®čŚļ¶„Āĺ„Āß„Ā®„Ā™„āč (šĺč„Āą„Āį, 40kHz„ĀßÁīĄ‚ąľ8.5mm). „Éē„āß„Éľ„āļ„ÉČ„āĘ„É¨„ā§„Āę„ĀĮ„Āď„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„Ā™Śą∂ÁīĄ„ĀĮ„Āā„āč„āā„Āģ„Āģ, Śäõ„ĀģśôāÁ©ļťĖďŚąÜŚłÉ„āíŤá™ÁĒĪ„Āę„Éá„ā∂„ā§„É≥„Āó, „Āē„Āĺ„ĀĖ„Āĺ„Ā™Ťß¶Ť¶ö„āíšĹú„āäŚáļ„Āô„Āď„Ā®„ĀĆ„Āß„Āć„āčśäÄŤ°ď„Ā®„Āó„Ā¶ś≥®Áõģ„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

„Āď„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„ĀęťĚěśé•Ťß¶„ĀßŤß¶Ť¶ö„āíŚąļśŅÄ„Āô„āčśäÄŤ°ďŚąÜťáé„āíÁ©ļšł≠Ťß¶Ť¶ö (Midair Haptics) „Ā®ŚĎľ„Ā≥, śąĎ„ÄÖ„ĀĮ„Āď„ĀģŤ∂Öťü≥ś≥ĘÁ©ļšł≠Ťß¶Ť¶öŤ£ÖÁĹģ„āíAirborne Ultrasound Tactile Display (AUTD) „Ā®ŚĎľ„āď„Āß„ĀĄ„āč. AUTD„Āģśú¨Ť≥™ÁöĄ„Ā™ťÉ®ŚąÜ„ĀĮ, 2008ŚĻī1„Āč„āČ2010ŚĻīšĽ£ŚąĚť†≠2„Āę„Āč„ĀĎ„Ā¶, śĚĪšļ¨Ś§ßŚ≠¶„Āę„āą„Ā£„Ā¶śŹźś°ą„ÉĽÁĘļÁęč„Āē„āĆ„Āü. „ĀĚ„ĀģŚĺĆ, ŚźĄŚõĹ„ĀģŚ§ßŚ≠¶„āĄšľĀś•≠„ĀĆŚŹāŚÖ•„Āó, śīĽÁôļ„Ā™Á†ĒÁ©∂ťĖčÁôļ„ĀĆŤ°Ć„āŹ„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč. AUTD3„ĀĮśąĎ„ÄÖśĚĪšļ¨Ś§ßŚ≠¶ÁĮ†ÁĒįÁČßťáéÁ†ĒÁ©∂Śģ§„ĀßťĖčÁôļ„Āó„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āčAUTD„Āģ3šĽ£Áõģ„Āģ„Éź„Éľ„āł„Éß„É≥„Āß„Āā„āč.

Á†ĒÁ©∂Śģ§„Āģ„Éõ„Éľ„É†„Éö„Éľ„āł„ĀęAUTD„āíšĹŅ„Ā£„ĀüÁ†ĒÁ©∂„ĀģšłÄŤ¶ß„ĀĆśé≤ŤľČ„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč. „Āď„Ā°„āČ„āāŚŹāÁÖß„Āē„āĆ„Āü„ĀĄ.

śú¨„Éě„Éč„É•„āĘ„Éę„ĀĮ„Āď„ĀģAUTD3„āíśďćšĹú„Āô„āč„Āü„āĀ„Āģautd3„āĹ„Éē„Éą„ā¶„āß„āĘ„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„Āę„Ā§„ĀĄ„Ā¶„Āĺ„Ā®„āĀ„Āü„āā„Āģ„Āß„Āā„āč.

1

Takayuki Iwamoto, Mari Tatezono, and Hiroyuki Shinoda: Non-contact Method for Producing Tactile Sensation Using Airborne Ultrasound, Haptics: Perception, Devices and Scenarios: 6th International Conference, Eurohaptics 2008 Proceedings (Lecture Notes in Computer Science), pp.504-513, 2008.

2

Takayuki Hoshi, Masafumi Takahashi, Takayuki Iwamoto, and Hiroyuki Shinoda: Noncontact Tactile Display Based on Radiation Pressure of Airborne Ultrasound, IEEE Trans. on Haptics, Vol. 3, No. 3, pp.155-165, 2010.

AUTD3„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ

AUTD3„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀĮ1ŚŹį„Āā„Āü„āä249ŚÄč„ĀģśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„Āč„āČśßčśąź„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč1. „Āē„āČ„Āę, Śĺ©śēį„Āģ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„āí„Éá„ā§„āł„Éľ„ÉĀ„āß„ā§„É≥„Āßśé•Á∂ö„Āóśč°ŚľĶ„Āß„Āć„āč„āą„ĀÜ„Āę„Ā™„Ā£„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč. SDK„Āč„āČ„ĀĮ„Āď„āĆ„āČŚÖ®„Ā¶„ĀģśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀģšĹćÁõł/śĆĮŚĻÖ„āí„ĀĚ„āĆ„Āě„āĆŚÄčŚą•„ĀęśĆáŚģö„Āß„Āć„āč„āą„ĀÜ„Āę„Ā™„Ā£„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

AUTD3„ĀģŚļßś®ôÁ≥Ľ„ĀĮŚŹ≥śČčŚļßś®ôÁ≥Ľ„āíśé°ÁĒ®„Āó„Ā¶„Āä„āä, 0Áē™Áõģ„ĀģśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„Āģšł≠ŚŅÉ„ĀĆŚéüÁāĻ„Āę„Ā™„āč. xŤĽł„ĀĮťē∑ŤĽłśĖĻŚźĎ, „Āô„Ā™„āŹ„Ā°, 0‚Üí17„ĀģśĖĻŚźĎ„Āß„Āā„āä, yŤĽł„ĀĮ0‚Üí18„ĀģśĖĻŚźĎ„Āß„Āā„āč.

„Āĺ„Āü, ŚćėšĹćÁ≥Ľ„Ā®„Āó„Ā¶, Ť∑ĚťõĘ„ĀĮmm„āíśé°ÁĒ®„Āó„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč. śĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀĮ10.16mm„ĀģťĖďťöĒ„ĀßťÖćÁĹģ„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„Āä„āä, ŚüļśĚŅ„āíŚźę„āĀ„Āü„āĶ„ā§„āļ„ĀĮ192mm√ó151.4mm„Ā®„Ā™„Ā£„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

„āĽ„ÉÉ„Éą„āĘ„ÉÉ„Éó

PC„Ā®1ŚŹįÁõģ„ĀģEherCAT In „āí„ā§„Éľ„āĶ„Éć„ÉÉ„Éą„āĪ„Éľ„ÉĖ„Éę„āíÁĻč„Āé, iŚŹįÁõģ„ĀģEherCAT Out„Ā®i+1ŚŹįÁõģ„ĀģEherCAT In„āíÁĻč„Āź. „Āď„Āģśôā, „ā§„Éľ„āĶ„Éć„ÉÉ„Éą„āĪ„Éľ„ÉĖ„Éę„ĀĮCAT 5ešĽ•šłä„Āģ„āā„Āģ„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®.

AUTD3„ĀģťõĽśļź„ĀĮ24V„ĀģÁõīśĶĀťõĽśļź„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč. ťõĽśļź„Āę„Ā§„ĀĄ„Ā¶„ĀĮÁõłšļí„Āęśé•Á∂ö„Āß„Āć, ťõĽśļź„ā≥„Éć„āĮ„āŅ„ĀĮ3„Ā§„ĀģŚÜÖ„ĀßŚ•Ĺ„Āć„Ā™„Ā®„Āď„āć„āíšĹŅ„Ā£„Ā¶ŤČĮ„ĀĄ. „Ā™„Āä, AUTD3„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻŚĀī„ĀģťõĽśļź„Āģ„ā≥„Éć„āĮ„āŅ„ĀĮMolexÁ§ĺ5566-02A„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āó„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

NOTE: AUTD3„ĀĮ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„Āā„Āü„āäśúÄŚ§ß„Āß2A„ĀģťõĽśĶĀ„āíś∂ąŤ≤Ľ„Āô„āč. ťõĽśļź„ĀģśúÄŚ§ßŚáļŚäõťõĽśĶĀ„Āęś≥®śĄŹ„Āē„āĆ„Āü„ĀĄ.

NOTE: ŚŹ§„ĀĄJ-Link„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āčŚ†īŚźą, ‚ÄúInstall legacy USB Driver for J-Link (requires admin rights)‚Äú„Āę„ÉĀ„āß„ÉÉ„āĮ„āíŚÖ•„āĆ„āč„Āď„Ā®. šĺč„Āą„Āį, J-Link Plus„ĀģŚ†īŚźą, V10šĽ•ŚČć„ĀĮlegacy USB Driver„ĀĆŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„Āę„Ā™„āč. ŚćėšłÄ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀģťßÜŚčē

„Āď„Āď„Āß„ĀĮ, šłÄ„Ā§„Āģ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„āíťßÜŚčē„Āô„āčśĖĻś≥ē„Āę„Ā§„ĀĄ„Ā¶Ť™¨śėé„Āô„āč.

šĺĚŚ≠ė„Éó„É≠„āį„É©„É†„Āģ„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę

śú¨„ÉĀ„É•„Éľ„Éą„É™„āĘ„Éę„Āß„ĀĮSOEM„āíŚą©ÁĒ®„Āô„āč. Windows„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āčŚ†īŚźą, Npcap„āí„ÄĆWinPcap API-compatible Mode„Äć„Āß„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę„Āó„Ā¶„Āä„ĀŹ„Āď„Ā®.

„Ā™„Āä, „Éē„ā°„Éľ„É†„ā¶„āß„āĘ„ĀĆŚŹ§„ĀĄŚ†īŚźą, ś≠£Śłł„Ā™ŚčēšĹú„ĀĮšŅĚŤ®ľ„Āē„āĆ„Ā™„ĀĄ. śú¨śĖáÁę†„Āę„Āä„ĀĎ„āč„Éē„ā°„Éľ„É†„ā¶„āß„āĘ„Āģ„Éź„Éľ„āł„Éß„É≥„ĀĮv10.0.1„ĀĆśÉ≥Śģö„Āē„āĆ„āč. „Éē„ā°„Éľ„É†„ā¶„āß„āĘ„Āģ„āĘ„ÉÉ„Éó„Éá„Éľ„Éą„ĀĮ„ĀĮ„Āė„āĀ„Āę/„Éē„ā°„Éľ„É†„ā¶„āß„āĘ„āíŚŹāÁÖß„Āē„āĆ„Āü„ĀĄ.

ŚźĄŤ®ÄŤ™ě„ĀĒ„Ā®„Āģ„āĶ„É≥„Éó„Éę„Éó„É≠„āį„É©„É†

  • Rust
  • C++
  • C#
  • Python
Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

RustÁČą„ÉĀ„É•„Éľ„Éą„É™„āĘ„Éę

„Āĺ„Āö„ĀĮťĀ©ŚĹď„Ā™„Éó„É≠„āł„āß„āĮ„Éą„āíšĹúśąź„Āó, autd3„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„āíšĺĚŚ≠ėťĖĘšŅā„ĀęŤŅĹŚä†„Āô„āč. „Āĺ„Āü, „Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„Ā®„ĀģťÄöšŅ°„āíŤ°Ć„ĀÜautd3-link-soem„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„āāšĺĚŚ≠ėťĖĘšŅā„ĀęŤŅĹŚä†„Āô„āč.

cargo new --bin autd3-sample
cd autd3-sample
cargo add autd3
cargo add autd3-link-soem

ś¨°„Āę, src/main.rs„Éē„ā°„ā§„Éę„āíÁ∑®ťõÜ„Āó, šĽ•šłč„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„Āę„Āô„āč. „Āď„āĆ„ĀĮŚćėšłÄÁĄ¶ÁāĻ„Āę150Hz„ĀģAMŚ§ČŤ™Ņ„āí„Āč„ĀĎ„āčŚ†īŚźą„Āģ„āĹ„Éľ„āĻ„ā≥„Éľ„ÉČ„Āß„Āā„āč.

use autd3::prelude::*;
use autd3_link_soem::{SOEMOption, Status, SOEM};

fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    // Open controller with SOEM link
    // Here, the AUTD3 device is placed at the origin
    let mut autd = Controller::open(
        [AUTD3 {
            pos: Point3::origin(),
            rot: UnitQuaternion::identity(),
        }],
        SOEM::new(
            // The first argument is a callback that is called when error occurs
            |slave, status| {
                eprintln!("slave[{}]: {}", slave, status);
                if status == Status::Lost {
                    // You can also wait for the link to recover, without exitting the process
                    std::process::exit(-1);
                }
            },
            // The second argument is a option of SOEM link.
            SOEMOption::default(),
        ),
    )?;

    // Check firmware version
    // This code assumes that the version is v10.0.1
    autd.firmware_version()?.iter().for_each(|firm_info| {
        println!("{}", firm_info);
    });

    // Enable silencer
    // Note that this is enabled by default, so it is not actually necessary
    // To disable, send Silencer::disable()
    autd.send(Silencer::default())?;

    // A focus at 150mm directly above the center of the device
    let g = Focus {
        pos: autd.center() + Vector3::new(0., 0., 150.0 * mm),
        option: FocusOption::default(),
    };

    // 150 Hz sine wave modulation
    let m = Sine {
        freq: 150 * Hz,
        option: SineOption::default(),
    };

    // Send data
    autd.send((m, g))?;

    println!("press enter to quit...");
    let mut _s = String::new();
    std::io::stdin().read_line(&mut _s)?;

    // Close controller
    autd.close()?;

    Ok(())
}

„ĀĚ„Āó„Ā¶, „Āď„āĆ„āíŚģüŤ°Ć„Āô„āč.

cargo run --release

Linux,macOSšĹŅÁĒ®śôā„Āģś≥®śĄŹ

Linux, macOS„Āß„ĀĮ, SOEM„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„Āģ„ĀęÁģ°ÁźÜŤÄÖś®©ťôź„ĀĆŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„Āę„Ā™„āč. „ĀĚ„ĀģŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ,

cargo build --release && sudo ./target/release/autd3_sample

„Ā®„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®.

Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

C++ÁČą„ÉĀ„É•„Éľ„Éą„É™„āĘ„Éę

šĺĚŚ≠ė„Éó„É≠„āį„É©„É†„Āģ„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę

śú¨„ÉĀ„É•„Éľ„Éą„É™„āĘ„Éę„Āß„ĀĮCMake„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„Āģ„Āß, „ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę„Āó„Ā¶„Āä„ĀŹ„Āď„Ā®.

AUTD3„āĮ„É©„ā§„āĘ„É≥„Éą„Éó„É≠„āį„É©„É†„ĀģšĹúśąź

„Āĺ„Āö, „āŅ„Éľ„Éü„Éä„Éę„āíťĖč„Āć, ťĀ©ŚĹď„Ā™„Éá„ā£„É¨„āĮ„Éą„É™„āíÁĒ®śĄŹ„Āô„āč.

mkdir autd3-sample
cd autd3-sample

ś¨°„Āę, autd3-samplešĽ•šłč„ĀęCMakeLists.txt, main.cpp„Éē„ā°„ā§„Éę„āíšĹúśąź„Āô„āč.

‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄautd3-sample
        CMakeLists.txt
        main.cpp

ś¨°„Āę, CMakeLists.txt„āíšĽ•šłč„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„Āę„Āô„āč.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)

project(autd3-sample)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)

if(${CMAKE_VERSION} VERSION_GREATER_EQUAL "3.24.0") 
  cmake_policy(SET CMP0135 NEW)
endif()

include(FetchContent)
if(WIN32)
  FetchContent_Declare(
    autd3
    URL https://github.com/shinolab/autd3-cpp/releases/download/v30.0.1/autd3-v30.0.1-win-x64.zip
  )
  FetchContent_Declare(
    autd3-link-soem
    URL https://github.com/shinolab/autd3-cpp-link-soem/releases/download/v30.0.1/autd3-link-soem-v30.0.1-win-x64.zip
  )
elseif(APPLE)
  FetchContent_Declare(
    autd3
    URL https://github.com/shinolab/autd3-cpp/releases/download/v30.0.1/autd3-v30.0.1-macos-aarch64.tar.gz
  )
  FetchContent_Declare(
    autd3-link-soem
    URL https://github.com/shinolab/autd3-cpp-link-soem/releases/download/v30.0.1/autd3-link-soem-v30.0.1-macos-aarch64.tar.gz
  )
else()
  FetchContent_Declare(
    autd3
    URL https://github.com/shinolab/autd3-cpp/releases/download/v30.0.1/autd3-v30.0.1-linux-x64.tar.gz
  )
  FetchContent_Declare(
    autd3-link-soem
    URL https://github.com/shinolab/autd3-cpp-link-soem/releases/download/v30.0.1/autd3-link-soem-v30.0.1-linux-x64.tar.gz
  )
endif()
set(USE_SYSTEM_EIGEN OFF)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(autd3 autd3-link-soem)

add_executable(main main.cpp)

target_link_libraries(main PRIVATE autd3::autd3 autd3::link::soem)

NOTE: šłäŤ®ė„Āģšĺč„Āß„ĀĮ, šĺĚŚ≠ė„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™ (Eigen3) „āíŤá™ŚčēÁöĄ„Āę„ÉÄ„ā¶„É≥„É≠„Éľ„ÉČ„Āô„āč„āą„ĀÜ„Āę„Ā™„Ā£„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč. „Āô„Āß„ĀęEigen3„ĀĆ„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āčŚ†īŚźą, USE_SYSTEM_EIGEN„āíON„Āę„Āô„āč„Ā®, Ťá™Śčē„ÉÄ„ā¶„É≥„É≠„Éľ„ÉČ„āíÁĄ°ŚäĻŚĆĖ„Āó, „ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éęśłą„ĀŅ„Āģ„āā„Āģ„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āß„Āć„āč.

„Āĺ„Āü, main.cpp„āíšĽ•šłč„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„Āę„Āô„āč. „Āď„āĆ„ĀĮŚćėšłÄÁĄ¶ÁāĻ„Āę150Hz„ĀģAMŚ§ČŤ™Ņ„āí„Āč„ĀĎ„āčŚ†īŚźą„Āģ„āĹ„Éľ„āĻ„ā≥„Éľ„ÉČ„Āß„Āā„āč.

#include <autd3_link_soem.hpp>
#include <iostream>

#include "autd3.hpp"

using namespace autd3;

int main() try {
  auto autd = Controller::open(
      {AUTD3{
          .pos = Point3::origin(),
          .rot = Quaternion::Identity(),
      }},
      link::SOEM(
          [](const uint16_t slave, const link::Status status) {
            std::cout << "slave [" << slave << "]: " << status << std::endl;
            if (status == link::Status::Lost()) exit(-1);
          },
          link::SOEMOption{}));

  const auto firm_version = autd.firmware_version();
  std::copy(firm_version.begin(), firm_version.end(),
            std::ostream_iterator<FirmwareVersion>(std::cout, "\n"));

  autd.send(Silencer{});

  Focus g(autd.center() + Vector3(0, 0, 150), FocusOption{});
  Sine m(150 * Hz, SineOption{});

  autd.send((m, g));

  std::cout << "press enter to finish..." << std::endl;
  std::cin.ignore();

  autd.close();

  return 0;
} catch (std::exception& ex) {
  std::cerr << ex.what() << std::endl;
}

ś¨°„Āę, CMake„Āß„Éď„Éę„ÉČ„Āô„āč.

mkdir build
cd build
cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release
cmake --build . --config Release

„Āď„āĆ„Āß, ŚģüŤ°Ć„Éē„ā°„ā§„Éę„ĀĆÁĒüśąź„Āē„āĆ„āč„Āģ„Āß, „Āď„āĆ„āíŚģüŤ°Ć„Āô„āč.

.\Release\main.exe

sudo ./main

„Éą„É©„ÉĖ„Éę„ā∑„É•„Éľ„ÉÜ„ā£„É≥„āį

  • anaconda (miniconda) „ĀĆactivate„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āčŚ†īŚźą„Āę, „Éď„Éę„ÉČ„ā®„É©„Éľ„Āę„Ā™„āčŚŹĮŤÉĹśÄß„ĀĆ„Āā„āč.
    • „Āď„ĀģŚ†īŚźą, build„Éá„ā£„É¨„āĮ„Éą„É™„āíŚČäťô§„Āó, conda deactivate„āíŚģüŤ°Ć„Āó„Āü„Āģ„Ā°ŚÜć„Ā≥cmake„āíŚģüŤ°Ć„Āô„āč.
Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

C#ÁČą„ÉĀ„É•„Éľ„Éą„É™„āĘ„Éę

„Āĺ„Āö, „āŅ„Éľ„Éü„Éä„Éę„āíťĖč„Āć, ťĀ©ŚĹď„Ā™„Éó„É≠„āł„āß„āĮ„Éą„āíšĹúśąź„Āó, AUTD3Sharp„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„āíŤŅĹŚä†„Āô„āč.

dotnet new console --name autd3-sample
cd autd3-sample
dotnet add package AUTD3Sharp
dotnet add package AUTD3Sharp.Link.SOEM

ś¨°„Āę, Program.cs„āíšĽ•šłč„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„Āę„Āô„āč. „Āď„āĆ„ĀĮŚćėšłÄÁĄ¶ÁāĻ„Āę150Hz„ĀģAMŚ§ČŤ™Ņ„āí„Āč„ĀĎ„āčŚ†īŚźą„Āģ„āĹ„Éľ„āĻ„ā≥„Éľ„ÉČ„Āß„Āā„āč.

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
using AUTD3Sharp.Link;
using AUTD3Sharp.Gain;
using AUTD3Sharp.Modulation;
using static AUTD3Sharp.Units;

using var autd = Controller.Open(
    [new AUTD3(pos: Point3.Origin, rot: Quaternion.Identity)],
    new SOEM(
        (slave, status) =>
            {
                Console.Error.WriteLine($"slave [{slave}]: {status}");
                if (status == Status.Lost)
                    Environment.Exit(-1);
            },
        new SOEMOption()
    )
);

var firmList = autd.FirmwareVersion();
foreach (var firm in firmList)
    Console.WriteLine(firm);

autd.Send(new Silencer());

var g = new Focus(
    pos: autd.Center() + new Vector3(0, 0, 150),
    option: new FocusOption()
);
var m = new Sine(
    freq: 150u * Hz,
    option: new SineOption()
);
autd.Send((m, g));

Console.ReadKey(true);

autd.Close();

„ĀĚ„Āó„Ā¶, „Āď„āĆ„āíŚģüŤ°Ć„Āô„āč.

dotnet run -c:Release

Linux,macOSšĹŅÁĒ®śôā„Āģś≥®śĄŹ

Linux, macOS„Āß„ĀĮ, SOEM„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„Āģ„ĀęÁģ°ÁźÜŤÄÖś®©ťôź„ĀĆŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„Ā™Ś†īŚźą„ĀĆ„Āā„āč. „ĀĚ„ĀģŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ,

sudo dotnet run -c:Release

„Ā®„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®.

Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

PythonÁČą„ÉĀ„É•„Éľ„Éą„É™„āĘ„Éę

pyautd3„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„Āģ„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę

pip install pyautd3
pip install pyautd3_link_soem

ś¨°„Āę, main.py„āíšĹúśąź„Āó, šĽ•šłč„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„Āę„Āô„āč. „Āď„āĆ„ĀĮŚćėšłÄÁĄ¶ÁāĻ„Āę150Hz„ĀģAMŚ§ČŤ™Ņ„āí„Āč„ĀĎ„āčŚ†īŚźą„Āģ„āĹ„Éľ„āĻ„ā≥„Éľ„ÉČ„Āß„Āā„āč.

import os

import numpy as np
from pyautd3 import (
    AUTD3,
    Controller,
    Focus,
    FocusOption,
    Hz,
    Silencer,
    Sine,
    SineOption,
)
from pyautd3_link_soem import SOEM, SOEMOption, Status


def err_handler(slave: int, status: Status) -> None:
    print(f"slave [{slave}]: {status}")
    if status == Status.Lost():
        os._exit(-1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    with Controller.open(
        [AUTD3(pos=[0.0, 0.0, 0.0], rot=[1, 0, 0, 0])],
        SOEM(err_handler=err_handler, option=SOEMOption()),
    ) as autd:
        firmware_version = autd.firmware_version()
        print(
            "\n".join(
                [f"[{i}]: {firm}" for i, firm in enumerate(firmware_version)],
            ),
        )

        autd.send(Silencer())

        g = Focus(
            pos=autd.center() + np.array([0.0, 0.0, 150.0]),
            option=FocusOption(),
        )
        m = Sine(
            freq=150 * Hz,
            option=SineOption(),
        )
        autd.send((m, g))

        _ = input()

        autd.close()

„ĀĚ„Āó„Ā¶, „Āď„āĆ„āíŚģüŤ°Ć„Āô„āč.

python main.py

LinuxšĹŅÁĒ®śôā„Āģś≥®śĄŹ

Linux„Āß„ĀĮ, SOEM„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„Āģ„ĀęÁģ°ÁźÜŤÄÖś®©ťôź„ĀĆŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„Āę„Ā™„āč. „ĀĚ„ĀģŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ,

sudo setcap cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin=eip <your python path>

„Ā®„Āó„ĀüŚĺĆ, main.py„āíŚģüŤ°Ć„Āô„āč.

python main.py

macOSšĹŅÁĒ®śôā„Āģś≥®śĄŹ

macOS„Āß„ĀĮ, SOEM„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„Āģ„ĀęÁģ°ÁźÜŤÄÖś®©ťôź„ĀĆŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„Āę„Ā™„āč. „ĀĚ„ĀģŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ,

sudo chmod +r /dev/bpf*

„Ā®„Āó„ĀüŚĺĆ, main.py„āíŚģüŤ°Ć„Āô„āč.

python main.py
Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

Ť§áśēį„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀģťßÜŚčē

AUTD3„ĀĮŤ§áśēį„Āģ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„āí„Éá„ā§„āł„Éľ„ÉĀ„āß„Éľ„É≥śé•Á∂ö„Āó„Ā¶Ś§ß„Āć„Ā™šłÄ„Ā§„Āģ„āĘ„É¨„ā§„āíśßčśąź„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®„ĀĆ„Āß„Āć„āč. SDK„ĀĮŤ§áśēįŚŹį„āíśé•Á∂ö„Āó„Āü„Ā®„Āó„Ā¶„āā, ťÄŹťĀéÁöĄ„ĀęšĹŅÁĒ®„Āß„Āć„āč„āą„ĀÜ„ĀęŤ®≠Ť®ą„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

SDK„ĀßŤ§áśēįŚŹį„Āģ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āčŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮController::openťĖĘśēį„ĀģÁ¨¨1Śľēśēį„Āßśé•Á∂ö„Āó„Āü„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„Āģť†Ü„ĀęAUTD3śßčťÄ†šĹď„āíśĆáŚģö„Āô„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč. „ÉŹ„Éľ„ÉČ„ā¶„āß„āĘ„Āģśé•Á∂öśĖĻś≥ē„ĀĮ„ĀĮ„Āė„āĀ„Āę/„ÉŹ„Éľ„ÉČ„ā¶„āß„āĘ„āíŚŹāÁÖß„Āē„āĆ„Āü„ĀĄ.

šĽ•šłč„Āß„ĀĮ, 2„Ā§„Āģ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„āíśé•Á∂ö„Āô„āčŚ†īŚźą„ĀģśČčť†Ü„āíÁ§ļ„Āô.

  • šł¶ťÄ≤„Āģ„ĀŅ
  • „āį„É≠„Éľ„Éź„ÉęŚļßś®ô„ĀģŤ®≠Śģö
  • šł¶ťÄ≤„Ā®ŚõěŤĽĘ

šł¶ťÄ≤„Āģ„ĀŅ

šĺč„Āą„Āį, šłäŚõ≥„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„ĀęťÖćÁĹģ„ÉĽśé•Á∂ö„Āó„Ā¶„Āä„āä, Śõ≥Ś∑¶ŚĀī„Āģ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀĆ1ŚŹįÁõģ, ŚŹ≥ŚĀī„Āģ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀĆ2ŚŹįÁõģ„Ā†„Ā®„Āô„āč. „Āē„āČ„Āę, „āį„É≠„Éľ„Éź„ÉęŚļßś®ô„āí1ŚŹįÁõģ„Āģ„É≠„Éľ„āę„ÉęŚļßś®ô„Ā®ŚźĆ„Āė„āą„ĀÜ„Āę„Ā®„āč„Ā®„Āô„āč„Ā®, „ā≥„Éľ„ÉČ„ĀĮšĽ•šłč„ĀģťÄö„āä„Āę„Ā™„āč.

use autd3::prelude::*;

fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
let link = autd3::link::Nop::new();
let _ =
Controller::open(
    [
        AUTD3 {
            pos: Point3::origin(),
            rot: UnitQuaternion::identity(),
        },
        AUTD3 {
            pos: Point3::new(AUTD3::DEVICE_WIDTH, 0., 0.),
            rot: UnitQuaternion::identity(),
        },
    ],
    link,
)?;
    Ok(())
}
#include<chrono>
#include<autd3.hpp>
#include<autd3/link/nop.hpp>
int main() {
using namespace autd3;
link::Nop link;
Controller::open({AUTD3{
                      .pos = Point3::origin(),
                      .rot = Quaternion::Identity(),
                  },
                  AUTD3{
                      .pos = Point3(AUTD3::DEVICE_WIDTH, 0, 0),
                      .rot = Quaternion::Identity(),
                  }},
                 std::move(link));
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Link;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
var link = new Nop();
Controller.Open([
   new AUTD3(pos: Point3.Origin, rot: Quaternion.Identity),
   new AUTD3(pos: new Point3(AUTD3.DeviceWidth, 0, 0), rot: Quaternion.Identity)
], link)
;

from pyautd3 import AUTD3, Controller
from pyautd3.link.nop import Nop
link = Nop()
Controller.open(
    [
        AUTD3(pos=[0.0, 0.0, 0.0], rot=[1, 0, 0, 0]),
        AUTD3(pos=[AUTD3.DEVICE_WIDTH, 0.0, 0.0], rot=[1, 0, 0, 0]),
    ],
    link,
)

„Āď„Āď„Āß, pos„ĀĮ„āį„É≠„Éľ„Éź„ÉęŚļßś®ô„Āę„Āä„ĀĎ„āč„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀģšĹćÁĹģ„āíŤ°®„Āô. „Ā™„Āä, AUTD3::DEVICE_WIDTH„ĀĮ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„Āģ (ŚüļśĚŅŚ§ĖŚĹĘ„āíŚźę„āĀ„Āü) ś®™ŚĻÖ„Āß„Āā„āč.

„āį„É≠„Éľ„Éź„ÉęŚļßś®ô„ĀģŤ®≠Śģö

SDK„ĀßšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„āį„É≠„Éľ„Éź„ÉęŚļßś®ô„ĀģŚéüÁāĻ„āĄŚźĎ„Āć„ĀĮ, „É¶„Éľ„ā∂„Éľ„ĀĆŤá™ÁĒĪ„ĀęŤ®≠Śģö„Āß„Āć„āč.

šĺč„Āą„Āį, šłäŚõ≥„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„Āę, „āį„É≠„Éľ„Éź„ÉęŚļßś®ô„āí2ŚŹįÁõģ„Āģ„É≠„Éľ„āę„ÉęŚļßś®ô„Ā®ŚźĆ„Āė„āą„ĀÜ„Āę„Ā®„āč„Ā®, „ā≥„Éľ„ÉČ„ĀĮšĽ•šłč„ĀģťÄö„āä„Āę„Ā™„āč.

use autd3::prelude::*;

fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
let link = autd3::link::Nop::new();
let _ =
Controller::open(
    [
        AUTD3 {
            pos: Point3::new(-AUTD3::DEVICE_WIDTH, 0., 0.),
            rot: UnitQuaternion::identity(),
        },
        AUTD3 {
            pos: Point3::origin(),
            rot: UnitQuaternion::identity(),
        },
    ],
    link,
)?;
    Ok(())
}
#include<chrono>
#include<autd3.hpp>
#include<autd3/link/nop.hpp>
int main() {
using namespace autd3;
link::Nop link;
Controller::open(
    {
        AUTD3{
            .pos = Point3(-AUTD3::DEVICE_WIDTH, 0, 0),
            .rot = Quaternion::Identity(),
        },
        AUTD3{
            .pos = Point3::origin(),
            .rot = Quaternion::Identity(),
        },
    },
    std::move(link));
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Link;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
var link = new Nop();
Controller.Open([
   new AUTD3(pos: new Point3(-AUTD3.DeviceWidth, 0, 0), rot: Quaternion.Identity),
   new AUTD3(pos: Point3.Origin, rot: Quaternion.Identity)
], link)
;

from pyautd3 import AUTD3, Controller
from pyautd3.link.nop import Nop
link = Nop()
Controller.open(
    [
        AUTD3(pos=[-AUTD3.DEVICE_WIDTH, 0.0, 0.0], rot=[1, 0, 0, 0]),
        AUTD3(pos=[0.0, 0.0, 0.0], rot=[1, 0, 0, 0]),
    ],
    link,
)

šł¶ťÄ≤„Ā®ŚõěŤĽĘ

„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀģŚõěŤĽĘ„āíśĆáŚģö„Āô„āčŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮrot„ĀßśĆáŚģö„Āô„āč. „Āď„Āď„ĀßŚõěŤĽĘ„ĀĮ„ā™„ā§„É©„ÉľŤßí, „Āĺ„Āü„ĀĮ, „āĮ„ā™„Éľ„āŅ„Éč„ā™„É≥„ĀßśĆáŚģö„Āô„āč.

šĺč„Āą„Āį, šłäŚõ≥„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„ĀęťÖćÁĹģ„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„Āä„āä, šłč„ĀĆ1ŚŹįÁõģ, Ś∑¶„ĀĆ2ŚŹįÁõģ„Āß, „āį„É≠„Éľ„Éź„ÉęŚļßś®ô„āí1ŚŹįÁõģ„Āģ„É≠„Éľ„āę„ÉęŚļßś®ô„Ā®ŚźĆ„Āė„Ā†„Ā®„Āô„āč„Ā®, „ā≥„Éľ„ÉČ„ĀĮšĽ•šłč„ĀģťÄö„āä„Āę„Ā™„āč.

use autd3::prelude::*;

fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
let link = autd3::link::Nop::new();
let _ =
Controller::open(
    [
        AUTD3 {
            pos: Point3::origin(),
            rot: UnitQuaternion::identity(),
        },
        AUTD3 {
            pos: Point3::new(0., 0., AUTD3::DEVICE_WIDTH),
            rot: EulerAngle::ZYZ(0. * rad, PI/2.0 * rad, 0. * rad).into(),
        },
    ],
    link,
)?;
    Ok(())
}
#include<chrono>
#include<autd3.hpp>
#include<autd3/link/nop.hpp>
int main() {
using namespace autd3;
link::Nop link;
Controller::open({AUTD3{
                      .pos = Point3::origin(),
                      .rot = Quaternion::Identity(),
                  },
                  AUTD3{
                      .pos = Point3(0, 0, AUTD3::DEVICE_WIDTH),
                      .rot = EulerAngles::ZYZ(0. * rad, pi / 2.0 * rad,
                                              0. * rad),
                  }},
                 std::move(link));
return 0; }

using System;
using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Link;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
using static AUTD3Sharp.Units;
var link = new Nop();
Controller.Open([
   new AUTD3(pos: Point3.Origin, rot: Quaternion.Identity),
   new AUTD3(
      pos: new Point3(0, 0, AUTD3.DeviceWidth),
      rot: EulerAngles.Zyz(0 * rad, MathF.PI / 2 * rad, 0 * rad))
], link)
;

import numpy as np
from pyautd3 import AUTD3, Controller, EulerAngles, Nop, rad
link = Nop()
Controller.open(
    [
        AUTD3(pos=[0.0, 0.0, 0.0], rot=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0]),
        AUTD3(
            pos=[0.0, 0.0, AUTD3.DEVICE_WIDTH],
            rot=EulerAngles.ZYZ(0 * rad, np.pi / 2 * rad, 0 * rad),
        ),
    ],
    link,
)

NOTE: RustÁČą„Āģ„ĀŅ, 12Á®ģť°ěŚÖ®„Ā¶„Āģ„ā™„ā§„É©„ÉľŤßí„ĀĆšĹŅÁĒ®„Āß„Āć„āč. „ĀĚ„āĆšĽ•Ś§Ė„ĀģŤ®ÄŤ™ě„Āß„ĀĮXYZ, ZYZ„Āģ„ĀŅ.

Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

„ā≥„É≥„āĽ„Éó„Éą

SDK„āíśßčśąź„Āô„āčšłĽ„Ā™„ā≥„É≥„ÉĚ„Éľ„Éć„É≥„Éą„ĀĮšĽ•šłč„ĀģťÄö„āä„Āß„Āā„āč.

  • Controller - AUTD3„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀęŚĮĺ„Āô„āčŚÖ®„Ā¶„ĀģśďćšĹú„ĀĮ„Āď„āĆ„āíšĽč„Āó„Ā¶Ť°Ć„ĀÜ.
  • Geometry - Device„Āģ„ā≥„É≥„ÉÜ„Éä.
    • Device - AUTD3„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀęŚĮĺŚŅú„Āô„āč. „Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀĆÁŹĺŚģüšłĖÁēĆ„Āß„Ā©„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„ĀęťÖćÁĹģ„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč„Āč„āíÁģ°ÁźÜ„Āô„āč. Transducer„Āģ„ā≥„É≥„ÉÜ„Éä.
    • Transducer - śĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀęŚĮĺŚŅú„Āô„āč. śĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀĆÁŹĺŚģüšłĖÁēĆ„Āß„Ā©„Āď„Āę„Āā„āč„Āč„āíÁģ°ÁźÜ„Āô„āč.
  • Link - „Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„Ā®„Āģ„ā§„É≥„āŅ„Éľ„Éē„āß„Éľ„āĻ.
  • Gain - ŚźĄśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀģšĹćÁõł/śĆĮŚĻÖ„āíÁģ°ÁźÜ„Āô„āč.
  • STM - Spatio-Temporal Modulation (STM, śôāÁ©ļťĖďŚ§ČŤ™Ņ) ś©üŤÉĹ„āíśŹźšĺõ„Āô„āč. ŚźĄśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀģšĹćÁõł/śĆĮŚĻÖ„Éá„Éľ„āŅ„ĀģśôāťĖďŚąó„āíÁģ°ÁźÜ„Āô„āč.
  • Modulation - AMŚ§ČŤ™Ņś©üŤÉĹ„āíśŹźšĺõ„Āô„āč„Āô„āč. Ś§ČŤ™Ņ„Éá„Éľ„āŅ„ĀģśôāťĖďŚąó„āíÁģ°ÁźÜ„Āô„āč.
  • Silencer - ťĚôťü≥ŚĆĖŚá¶ÁźÜ„āíÁģ°ÁźÜ„Āô„āč.

„āĹ„Éē„Éą„ā¶„āß„āĘ„ĀģšĹŅÁĒ®śĖĻś≥ē„ĀĮšĽ•šłč„ĀģťÄö„āä„Āß„Āā„āč.

„Āĺ„Āö, ÁŹĺŚģüšłĖÁēĆ„ĀģAUTD3„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀģťÖćÁĹģ„āíśĆáŚģö„Āó, „Ā©„ĀģLink„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„Āč„āíśĪļ„āĀ, Controller„āíťĖč„ĀŹ. ś¨°„Āę, Controller„āíšĽč„Āó„Ā¶, Gain („Āĺ„Āü„ĀĮSTM), Modulation, Silencer„Éá„Éľ„āŅ„āí„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀęťÄĀšŅ°„Āô„āč.

ťÄĀšŅ°„Āē„āĆ„Āü„Éá„Éľ„āŅ„ĀęŚüļ„Ā•„ĀĄ„ĀüPWMšŅ°ŚŹ∑„ĀĆśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀęŚćįŚä†„Āē„āĆ„āč. šŅ°ŚŹ∑„ĀĆÁĒüśąź„Āē„āĆ„āč„Āĺ„Āß„ĀģśĶĀ„āĆ„ĀĮšĽ•šłč„ĀģŚõ≥„ĀģťÄö„āä„Āß„Āā„āč.

Gain/STM„ĀßśĆáŚģö„Āē„āĆ„ĀüśĆĮŚĻÖ„Éá„Éľ„āŅ„ĀĮ, Modulation„ĀßśĆáŚģö„Āē„āĆ„ĀüŚ§ČŤ™Ņ„Éá„Éľ„āŅ„Ā®ť†Üś¨°śéõ„ĀĎŚźą„āŹ„Āē„āĆ„ĀüŚĺĆ, Silencer„Āęśł°„Āē„āĆ„āč. Gain/STM„ĀßśĆáŚģö„Āē„āĆ„ĀüšĹćÁõł„Éá„Éľ„āŅ„ĀĮ, „ĀĚ„Āģ„Āĺ„ĀĺSilencer„Āęśł°„Āē„āĆ„āč. Silencer„ĀĮ, „Āď„āĆ„āČ„Āģ„Éá„Éľ„āŅ„āíťĚôťü≥ŚĆĖŚá¶ÁźÜ1„Āô„āč. śúÄŚĺĆ„Āę, Silencer„ĀßŚá¶ÁźÜ„Āē„āĆ„ĀüśĆĮŚĻÖ/šĹćÁõł„Éá„Éľ„āŅ„ĀęŚüļ„Ā•„ĀćPWMšŅ°ŚŹ∑„ĀĆÁĒüśąź„Āē„āĆ, śĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀęŚćįŚä†„Āē„āĆ„āč.

„Ā™„Āä, śĆĮŚĻÖ/šĹćÁõł„Éá„Éľ„āŅ, ŚŹä„Ā≥, Ś§ČŤ™Ņ„Éá„Éľ„āŅ„ĀĮ„Āô„ĀĻ„Ā¶8bit„Āß„Āā„āč.

1

Ť©≥Áīį„ĀĮSilencer„āíŚŹāÁÖß.

Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

Geometry

Geometry„ĀĮAUTD3„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀĆÁŹĺŚģüšłĖÁēĆ„Āß„Ā©„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„ĀęťÖćÁĹģ„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč„Āč„āíÁģ°ÁźÜ„Āó„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

  • „Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ/śĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„Āģ„ā§„É≥„Éá„ÉÉ„āĮ„āĻ
  • Geometry„ĀģAPI
    • Device„ĀģŚŹĖŚĺó
  • Device„ĀģAPI
    • Transducer„ĀģŚŹĖŚĺó
  • Transducer„ĀģAPI

„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ/śĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„Āģ„ā§„É≥„Éá„ÉÉ„āĮ„āĻ

„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„Āę„ĀĮśé•Á∂ö„Āē„āĆ„Āüť†Ü„Āę0„Āč„āČŚßč„Āĺ„āč„ā§„É≥„Éá„ÉÉ„āĮ„āĻ„ĀĆŚČ≤„āäŚĹď„Ā¶„āČ„āĆ„āč.

„Āĺ„Āü, ŚźĄ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀĮ249ŚÄč„ĀģśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀĆťÖćÁĹģ„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„Āä„āä, „É≠„Éľ„āę„Éę„ā§„É≥„Éá„ÉÉ„āĮ„āĻ„ĀĆŚČ≤„āäśĆĮ„āČ„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč („ĀĮ„Āė„āĀ„Āę/„ÉŹ„Éľ„ÉČ„ā¶„āß„āĘ„Āģ„ÄĆAUTD„ĀģŤ°®ťĚĘŚÜôÁúü„Äć„āíŚŹāÁÖß).

Geometry„ĀģAPI

  • num_devices(): śúČŚäĻ„Ā™„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„Āģśēį„āíŚŹĖŚĺó
  • num_transducers(): śúČŚäĻ„Ā™ŚÖ®śĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„Āģśēį„āíŚŹĖŚĺó
  • center(): śúČŚäĻ„Ā™ŚÖ®śĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„Āģšł≠ŚŅÉ„āíŚŹĖŚĺó

„Ā™„Āä, Geometry„Āę„ĀĮController„Āč„āČÁõīśé•„āĘ„āĮ„āĽ„āĻ„Āß„Āć„āč.

use autd3::prelude::*;
#[allow(unused_variables)]
fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
let autd = Controller::open([AUTD3::default()], autd3::link::Nop::new())?;
let num_dev = autd.num_devices();
let num_tr = autd.num_transducers();
let center = autd.center();
Ok(())
}
#include<chrono>
#include<autd3.hpp>
#include<autd3/link/nop.hpp>
int main() {
using namespace autd3;
auto autd =
Controller::open({AUTD3{}}, link::Nop{});
const auto num_dev = autd.num_devices();
const auto num_tr = autd.num_transducers();
const auto center = autd.center();
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Link;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
using var autd = Controller.Open([new AUTD3()], new Nop());
var numDevices = autd.NumDevices();
var numTransducers = autd.NumTransducers();
var center = autd.Center();

from pyautd3 import AUTD3, Controller
from pyautd3.link.nop import Nop
autd = Controller.open([AUTD3()], Nop())
num_devices = autd.num_devices()
num_transducers = autd.num_transducers()
center = autd.center()

Device„ĀģŚŹĖŚĺó

Geometry„ĀĮDevice„Āģ„ā≥„É≥„ÉÜ„Éä„Āę„Ā™„Ā£„Ā¶„Āä„āä, Device„ĀĆTransducer„Āģ„ā≥„É≥„ÉÜ„Éä„Āę„Ā™„Ā£„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

Device„āíŚŹĖŚĺó„Āô„āč„Āę„ĀĮ, „ā§„É≥„Éá„āĮ„āĶ„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč. „Āā„āč„ĀĄ„ĀĮ, „ā§„ÉÜ„É¨„Éľ„āŅ„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®„āā„Āß„Āć„āč.

use autd3::prelude::*;
#[allow(unused_variables)]
fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
let autd = Controller::open([AUTD3::default()], autd3::link::Nop::new())?;
let dev = &autd[0];
for dev in &autd {
    // do something
}
Ok(())
}
#include<chrono>
#include<autd3.hpp>
#include<autd3/link/nop.hpp>
int main() {
using namespace autd3;
auto autd =
Controller::open({AUTD3{}}, link::Nop{});
{
auto dev = autd[0];
}
{
for (auto& dev : autd) {
  // do something
}
}
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Link;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
using var autd = Controller.Open([new AUTD3()], new Nop());
{
var dev = autd[0];
}
foreach (var dev in autd)
{
  // do something
}

from pyautd3 import AUTD3, Controller
from pyautd3.link.nop import Nop
autd = Controller.open([AUTD3()], Nop())
dev = autd[0]
for _dev in autd:
    pass

Device„ĀģAPI

  • idx(): „Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„Āģ„ā§„É≥„Éá„ÉÉ„āĮ„āĻ
  • enable: śúČŚäĻ/ÁĄ°ŚäĻ„Éē„É©„āį. „ā™„Éē„Āę„Āô„āč„Ā®, šĽ•ťôć, „ĀĚ„Āģ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„Āģ„Éá„Éľ„āŅ„ĀĮśõīśĖį„Āē„āĆ„Ā™„ĀŹ„Ā™„āč.
    • śõīśĖį„Āē„āĆ„Ā™„ĀŹ„Ā™„āč„Ā†„ĀĎ„Āß, ŚáļŚäõ„ĀĆś≠Ę„Āĺ„āč„āŹ„ĀĎ„Āß„ĀĮ„Ā™„ĀĄ„Āď„Ā®„Āęś≥®śĄŹ.
  • sound_speed: ťü≥ťÄü„ĀģŚŹĖŚĺó/Ť®≠Śģö. ŚćėšĹć„ĀĮmm/s. šĹćÁõłŤ®ąÁģó„Ā™„Ā©„ĀęšĹŅÁĒ®„Āē„āĆ„āč„Āü„āĀ, ŚŹĮŤÉĹ„Ā™ťôź„āäÁŹĺŚģü„ĀęŚć≥„Āó„ĀüŚÄ§„āíŤ®≠Śģö„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®„āí„Āä„Āô„Āô„āĀ„Āô„āč. „Éá„Éē„ā©„Éę„Éą„Āģťü≥ťÄü„ĀĮ340√ó103mm/s„Ā®„Ā™„Ā£„Ā¶„Āä„āä, „Āď„āĆ„ĀĮ, „Āä„āą„ĀĚśĎāśįŹ15Śļ¶„Āß„ĀģÁ©ļśįó„Āģťü≥ťÄü„ĀęÁõłŚĹď„Āô„āč.
  • set_sound_speed_from_temp(temp): śł©Śļ¶temp [‚ĄÉ]„Āč„āČťü≥ťÄü„āíŤ®≠Śģö. „Ā™„Āä, Geometry„Āę„āāŚźĆŚźć„ĀģťĖĘśēį„ĀĆ„Āā„āä, „ĀĚ„āĆ„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®„Āß„Āô„ĀĻ„Ā¶„ĀģśúČŚäĻ„Ā™„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀęŚĮĺ„Āó„Ā¶śł©Śļ¶„Āč„āČťü≥ťÄü„āíŤ®≠Śģö„Āß„Āć„āč.
  • translate(t): t„Āę„āą„āčŚĻ≥Ť°ĆÁßĽŚčē
  • rotate(r): r„Āę„āą„āčŚõěŤĽĘ
  • affine(t, r): „āĘ„Éē„ā£„É≥Ś§ČśŹõ (t„Āę„āą„āčŚĻ≥Ť°ĆÁßĽŚčē„Ā®r„Āę„āą„āčŚõěŤĽĘ)
  • wavelength(): „Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀĆśĒĺŚáļ„Āô„āčŤ∂Öťü≥ś≥Ę„Āģś≥Ęťē∑
  • wavenumber(): „Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀĆśĒĺŚáļ„Āô„āčŤ∂Öťü≥ś≥Ę„Āģś≥Ęśēį
  • rotation(): „Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀģŚõěŤĽĘ
  • x_direction(): „Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀģxśĖĻŚźĎ„Éô„āĮ„Éą„Éę
  • y_direction(): „Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀģyśĖĻŚźĎ„Éô„āĮ„Éą„Éę
  • axial_direction(): „Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀģŤĽłśĖĻŚźĎ„Éô„āĮ„Éą„Éę (śĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀĆŚźĎ„ĀŹśĖĻŚźĎ)
use autd3::prelude::*;
#[allow(unused_variables)]
fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
let mut autd = Controller::open([AUTD3::default()], autd3::link::Nop::new())?;
let dev = &mut autd[0];
let idx = dev.idx();
dev.enable = false;
dev.sound_speed = 340e3;
dev.set_sound_speed_from_temp(15.);
let t = Vector3::new(1., 0., 0.);
let r = UnitQuaternion::from_quaternion(Quaternion::new(1., 0., 0., 0.));
dev.translate(t);
dev.rotate(r);
dev.affine(t, r);
let wavelength = dev.wavelength();
let wavenumber = dev.wavenumber();
let rotation = dev.rotation();
let x_dir = dev.x_direction();
let y_dir = dev.y_direction();
let axial_dir = dev.axial_direction();
Ok(())
}
#include<chrono>
#include<autd3.hpp>
#include<autd3/link/nop.hpp>
int main() {
using namespace autd3;
auto autd =
Controller::open({AUTD3{}}, link::Nop{});
auto dev = autd[0];
const auto idx = dev.idx();
const auto enable = dev.enable();
dev.set_enable(false);
const auto sound_speed = dev.sound_speed();
dev.set_sound_speed(340e3);
dev.set_sound_speed_from_temp(15.);
const auto t = Vector3(1., 0., 0.);
const auto r = Quaternion(1., 0., 0., 0.);
dev.translate(t);
dev.rotate(r);
dev.affine(t, r);
const auto wavelength = dev.wavelength();
const auto wavenumber = dev.wavenumber();
const auto rotation = dev.rotation();
const auto x_dir = dev.x_direction();
const auto y_dir = dev.y_direction();
const auto axial_dir = dev.axial_direction();
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Link;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
using var autd = Controller.Open([new AUTD3()], new Nop());
var dev = autd[0];
var idx = dev.Idx();
dev.Enable = false;
dev.SoundSpeed = 340e3f;
dev.SetSoundSpeedFromTemp(15);
var t = new Vector3(1, 0, 0);
var r = new Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 1);
dev.Translate(t);
dev.Rotate(r);
dev.Affine(t, r);
var wavelength = dev.Wavelength();
var wavenumber = dev.Wavenumber();
var rotation = dev.Rotation();
var xDir = dev.XDirection();
var yDir = dev.YDirection();
var axialDir = dev.AxialDirection();

import numpy as np
from pyautd3 import AUTD3, Controller
from pyautd3.link.nop import Nop
autd = Controller.open([AUTD3()], Nop())
dev = autd[0]
idx = dev.idx()
dev.enable = False
dev.sound_speed = 340e3
dev.set_sound_speed_from_temp(15.0)
t = np.array([1.0, 0.0, 0.0])
r = np.array([1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0])
dev.translate(t)
dev.rotate(r)
dev.affine(t, r)
wavelength = dev.wavelength()
wavenumber = dev.wavenumber()
rotation = dev.rotation()
x_dir = dev.x_direction()
y_dir = dev.y_direction()
axial_dir = dev.axial_direction()

Transducer„ĀģŚŹĖŚĺó

Device„ĀĮTransducer„Āģ„ā≥„É≥„ÉÜ„Éä„Āę„Ā™„Ā£„Ā¶„Āä„āä, Transducer„ĀĮŚźĄśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀģśÉÖŚ†Ī„āíś†ľÁīć„Āó„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

Transducer„āíŚŹĖŚĺó„Āô„āč„Āę„ĀĮ, „ā§„É≥„Éá„āĮ„āĶ„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč. „Āĺ„Āü, „ā§„ÉÜ„É¨„Éľ„āŅ„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®„āā„Āß„Āć„āč.

use autd3::prelude::*;
#[allow(unused_variables)] 
fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
let autd = Controller::open([AUTD3::default()], autd3::link::Nop::new())?;
let tr = &autd[0][0];
for tr in &autd[0] {
    // do something
}
Ok(())
}
#include<chrono>
#include<autd3.hpp>
#include<autd3/link/nop.hpp>
int main() {
using namespace autd3;
auto autd =
Controller::open({AUTD3{}}, link::Nop{});
{
auto tr = autd[0][0];
}
{
for (auto& tr : autd[0]) {
  // do something
}
}
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Link;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
using var autd = Controller.Open([new AUTD3()], new Nop());
{
var tr = autd[0][0];
}
foreach (var tr in autd[0])
{
  // do something
}

from pyautd3 import AUTD3, Controller
from pyautd3.link.nop import Nop
autd = Controller.open([AUTD3()], Nop())
tr = autd[0][0]
for _tr in autd[0]:
    pass

Transducer„ĀģAPI

šĽ•šłč„ĀģśÉÖŚ†Ī„āíŚŹĖŚĺó„Āß„Āć„āč.

  • idx(): śĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„Āģ(„É≠„Éľ„āę„Éę)„ā§„É≥„Éá„ÉÉ„āĮ„āĻ
  • dev_idx(): śĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀĆŚĪě„Āô„āč„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„Āģ„ā§„É≥„Éá„ÉÉ„āĮ„āĻ
  • position(): śĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀģšĹćÁĹģ
use autd3::prelude::*;
#[allow(unused_variables)]
fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
let autd = Controller::open([AUTD3::default()], autd3::link::Nop::new())?;
let tr = &autd[0][0];
let idx = tr.idx();
let dev_idx = tr.dev_idx();
let position = tr.position();
Ok(())
}
#include<autd3.hpp>
#include<autd3/link/nop.hpp>
int main() {
using namespace autd3;
auto autd =
Controller::open({AUTD3{}}, link::Nop{});
const auto tr = autd[0][0];
const auto idx = tr.idx();
const auto dev_idx = tr.dev_idx();
const auto position = tr.position();
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Link;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
using var autd = Controller.Open([new AUTD3()], new Nop());
var tr = autd[0][0];
var trIdx = tr.Idx();
var devIdx = tr.DevIdx();
var position = tr.Position();

from pyautd3 import AUTD3, Controller
from pyautd3.link.nop import Nop
autd = Controller.open([AUTD3()], Nop())
tr = autd[0][0]
idx = tr.idx()
dev_idx = tr.dev_idx()
position = tr.position()

Link

Link„ĀĮAUTD3„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„Ā®„Āģ„ā§„É≥„āŅ„Éľ„Éē„āß„Éľ„āĻ„Āß„Āā„āč. šĽ•šłč„Āģšł≠„Āč„āČšłÄ„Ā§„āíťĀłśäě„Āô„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč.

  • TwinCAT

TwinCAT

TwinCAT„ĀĮPC„ĀßEherCAT„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āčťöõ„ĀģŚĒĮšłÄ„ĀģŚÖ¨ŚľŹ„ĀģśĖĻś≥ē„Āß„Āā„āč. TwinCAT„ĀĮWindows„Āģ„ĀŅ„āí„āĶ„ÉĚ„Éľ„Éą„Āô„āčťĚěŚłł„ĀęÁČĻśģä„Ā™„āĹ„Éē„Éą„ā¶„āß„āĘ„Āß„Āā„āä, Windows„āíŚćä„ĀįŚľ∑Śľē„Āę„É™„āĘ„Éę„āŅ„ā§„É†ŚĆĖ„Āô„āč.

„Āĺ„Āü, ÁČĻŚģö„Āģ„Éć„ÉÉ„Éą„ÉĮ„Éľ„āĮ„ā≥„É≥„Éą„É≠„Éľ„É©„ĀĆśĪā„āĀ„āČ„āĆ„āč„Āü„āĀ, ŚĮĺŚŅú„Āô„āč„Éć„ÉÉ„Éą„ÉĮ„Éľ„āĮ„ā≥„É≥„Éą„É≠„Éľ„É©„ĀģšłÄŤ¶ß„āíÁĘļŤ™ć„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®.

Note: śąĖ„ĀĄ„ĀĮ, TwinCAT„Āģ„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„ÉęŚĺĆ„Āę, C:/TwinCAT/3.1/Driver/System/TcI8254x.inf„ĀęŚĮĺŚŅú„Āô„āč„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀģVendor ID„Ā®Device ID„ĀĆśõł„Āč„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč„Āģ„Āß,„ÄĆ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„Éě„Éć„Éľ„āł„É£„Éľ„Äć‚Üí„ÄĆ„ā§„Éľ„āĶ„Éć„ÉÉ„Éą„āĘ„ÉÄ„Éó„āŅ„Äć‚Üí„ÄĆ„Éó„É≠„ÉĎ„ÉÜ„ā£„Äć‚Üí„ÄĆŤ©≥Áīį„Äć‚Üí„ÄĆ„ÉŹ„Éľ„ÉČ„ā¶„āß„āĘID„Äć„Ā®ÁÖß„āČ„ĀóŚźą„āŹ„Āõ„āč„Āď„Ā®„Āß„āāÁĘļŤ™ć„Āß„Āć„āč.

šłäŤ®ėšĽ•Ś§Ė„Āģ„Éć„ÉÉ„Éą„ÉĮ„Éľ„āĮ„ā≥„É≥„Éą„É≠„Éľ„É©„Āß„āāŚčēšĹú„Āô„āčŚ†īŚźą„ĀĆ„Āā„āč„ĀĆ, „ĀĚ„ĀģŚ†īŚźą, ś≠£Śłł„Ā™ŚčēšĹú„Ā®„É™„āĘ„Éę„āŅ„ā§„É†śÄß„ĀĮšŅĚŤ®ľ„Āē„āĆ„Ā™„ĀĄ.

  • šļčŚČćśļĖŚāô
    • TwinCAT„Āģ„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę
    • AUTD3 Server„Āģ„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę
    • ŚąĚŚõě„ĀģŤŅĹŚä†šĹúś•≠
    • AUTD Server„ĀģŚģüŤ°Ć
    • „É©„ā§„āĽ„É≥„āĻ
  • TwinCAT„É™„É≥„āĮ
    • Install
    • APIs
    • „Éą„É©„ÉĖ„Éę„ā∑„É•„Éľ„ÉÜ„ā£„É≥„āį

šļčŚČćśļĖŚāô

TwinCAT„Āģ„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę

ŚČćśŹź„Ā®„Āó„Ā¶, TwinCAT„ĀĮHyper-V„āĄVirtual Machine Platform„Ā®ŚÖĪŚ≠ė„Āß„Āć„Ā™„ĀĄ. „ĀĚ„Āģ„Āü„āĀ, „Āď„āĆ„āČ„Āģś©üŤÉĹ„āíÁĄ°ŚäĻ„Āę„Āô„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč. „Āď„āĆ„Āę„ĀĮ, šĺč„Āą„Āį, PowerShell„āíÁģ°ÁźÜŤÄÖś®©ťôź„ĀßŤĶ∑Śčē„Āó,

Disable-WindowsOptionalFeature -Online -FeatureName Microsoft-Hyper-V-Hypervisor
Disable-WindowsOptionalFeature -Online -FeatureName VirtualMachinePlatform

„Ā®śČď„Ā°Ťĺľ„āĀ„ĀįŤČĮ„ĀĄ.

„Āĺ„Āü, Windows 11„ĀģŚ†īŚźą, šĽģśÉ≥ŚĆĖ„Éô„Éľ„āĻ„Āģ„āĽ„ā≠„É•„É™„ÉÜ„ā£ś©üŤÉĹ„āā„ā™„Éē„Āę„Āô„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč. „ÄĆWindows „āĽ„ā≠„É•„É™„ÉÜ„ā£„Äć‚Üí „ÄĆ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ „āĽ„ā≠„É•„É™„ÉÜ„ā£„Äć‚Üí„ÄĆ„ā≥„āĘŚąÜťõĘ„Äć‚Üí„ÄĆ„É°„ÉĘ„É™śēīŚźąśÄß„Äć„āí„ā™„Éē„Āę„Āô„āč.

„Āĺ„Āö, TwinCAT XAE„āíŚÖ¨ŚľŹ„āĶ„ā§„Éą„Āč„āČ„ÉÄ„ā¶„É≥„É≠„Éľ„ÉČ„Āô„āč. „ÉÄ„ā¶„É≥„É≠„Éľ„ÉČ„Āę„ĀĮÁôĽťĆ≤ (ÁĄ°śĖô) „ĀĆŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„Āę„Ā™„āč.

„ÉÄ„ā¶„É≥„É≠„Éľ„ÉČ„Āó„Āü„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„É©„āíŤĶ∑Śčē„Āó, śĆáÁ§ļ„ĀęŚĺď„ĀÜ. „Āď„Āģśôā, TwinCAT XAE Shell install„Āę„ÉĀ„āß„ÉÉ„āĮ„āíŚÖ•„āĆ, Visual Studio Integration„Āģ„ÉĀ„āß„ÉÉ„āĮ„āíŚ§Ė„Āô„Āď„Ā®.

„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„ÉęŚĺĆ„ĀęŚÜćŤĶ∑Śčē„Āó, C:/TwinCAT/3.1/System/win8settick.bat„āíÁģ°ÁźÜŤÄÖś®©ťôź„ĀßŚģüŤ°Ć„Āó, ŚÜć„Ā≥ŚÜćŤĶ∑Śčē„Āô„āč.

AUTD3 Server„Āģ„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę

TwinCAT„ĀģLink„āíšĹŅ„ĀÜ„Āę„ĀĮ, „Āĺ„Āö, AUTD3 Server„āí„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę„Āô„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč. GitHub Releases„Āę„Ā¶„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„É©„āíťÖćŚłÉ„Āó„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč„Āģ„Āß, „Āď„āĆ„āí„ÉÄ„ā¶„É≥„É≠„Éľ„ÉČ„Āó, śĆáÁ§ļ„ĀęŚĺď„Ā£„Ā¶„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę„Āô„āč.

NOTE: ŚŅÖ„Āö, šĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„āĹ„Éē„Éą„ā¶„āß„āĘ„Āģ„Éź„Éľ„āł„Éß„É≥„ĀęŚźą„āŹ„Āõ„ĀüAUTD Server„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®.

NOTE: CLIÁČą„āā„Āā„āč.

AUTD3 Server„āíŚģüŤ°Ć„Āô„āč„Ā®, šĽ•šłč„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„Ā™ÁĒĽťĚĘ„Āę„Ā™„āč„Āģ„Āß, TwinCAT„āŅ„ÉĖ„āíťĖč„ĀŹ.

ŚąĚŚõě„ĀģŤŅĹŚä†šĹúś•≠

ŚąĚŚõě„Āģ„ĀŅ, šĽ•šłč„ĀģšĹúś•≠„ĀĆŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„Āę„Ā™„āč.

„Āĺ„Āö, „ÄĆCopy AUTD.xml„Äć„Éú„āŅ„É≥„āíśäľ„Āô. „Āď„Āď„Āß, „ÄĆAUTD.xml is successfully copied„Äć„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„Ā™„É°„ÉÉ„āĽ„Éľ„āł„ĀĆŚáļ„āĆ„ĀįśąźŚäü„Āß„Āā„āč.

ś¨°„Āę, „ÄĆOpen XAE Shell„Äć„Éú„āŅ„É≥„āíśäľ„Āó, XAE Shell„āíťĖč„ĀŹ. TwinCAT XAE ShellšłäťÉ®„É°„Éč„É•„Éľ„Āč„āČ„ÄĆTwinCAT„Äć‚Üí„ÄĆShow Realtime Ethernet Compatible Devices„Äć„āíťĖč„Āć„ÄĆCompatible devices„Äć„Āģšł≠„ĀģŚĮĺŚŅú„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„āíťĀłśäě„Āó, Install„āí„āĮ„É™„ÉÉ„āĮ„Āô„āč. „ÄĆInstalled and ready to use devices (realtime capable)„Äć„Āę„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę„Āē„āĆ„Āü„āĘ„ÉÄ„Éó„āŅ„ĀĆŤ°®Á§ļ„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āĆ„ĀįśąźŚäü„Āß„Āā„āč.

„Ā™„Āä,„ÄĆCompatible devices„Äć„ĀęšĹē„āāŤ°®Á§ļ„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„Ā™„ĀĄŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ„ĀĚ„ĀģPC„Āģ„ā§„Éľ„āĶ„Éć„ÉÉ„Éą„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀĮTwinCAT„ĀęŚĮĺŚŅú„Āó„Ā¶„ĀĄ„Ā™„ĀĄ. „ÄĆIncompatible devices„Äć„Āģšł≠„Āģ„ÉČ„É©„ā§„Éź„āā„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„ÉęŤá™šĹď„ĀĮŚŹĮŤÉĹ„Āß, „ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę„Āô„āč„Ā®„ÄĆInstalled and ready to use devices (for demo use only)„Äć„Ā®Ť°®Á§ļ„Āē„āĆ„āč. „Āď„ĀģŚ†īŚźą, šĹŅÁĒ®„Āß„Āć„āč„ĀĆŚčēšĹúšŅĚŤ®ľ„ĀĮ„Ā™„ĀĄ.

AUTD Server„ĀģŚģüŤ°Ć

AUTD3„Ā®PC„āíśé•Á∂ö„Āó, AUTD3„ĀģťõĽśļź„ĀĆŚÖ•„Ā£„ĀüÁä∂śÖč„Āß, „ÄĆRun„Äć„Éú„āŅ„É≥„āíśäľ„Āô. „Āď„Āģ„Ā®„Āć, „ÄĆClient IP address„Äć„Āģś¨Ą„ĀĮÁ©ļÁôĹ„Āę„Āó„Ā¶„Āä„ĀŹ„Āď„Ā®.

šłč„ĀģÁĒĽťĚĘ„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„Āę, AUTD3„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀĆŤ¶č„Ā§„Āč„Ā£„Āüśó®„Āģ„É°„ÉÉ„āĽ„Éľ„āł„ĀĆŚáļ„āĆ„ĀįśąźŚäü„Āß„Āā„āč.

„Ā™„Āä, TwinCAT„ĀĮPC„ĀģťõĽśļź„āíŚąá„āč, „āĻ„É™„Éľ„Éó„ÉĘ„Éľ„ÉČ„ĀęŚÖ•„āčÁ≠Č„Āßśé•Á∂ö„ĀĆťÄĒŚąá„āĆ„āč„Āģ„Āß, „ĀĚ„ĀģťÉĹŚļ¶ŚģüŤ°Ć„ĀóÁõī„Āô„Āď„Ā®.

„É©„ā§„āĽ„É≥„āĻ

ŚąĚŚõě„ĀĮ„É©„ā§„āĽ„É≥„āĻťĖĘšŅā„Āģ„ā®„É©„Éľ„ĀĆŚáļ„āč„Āģ„Āß, XAE Shell„Āß„ÄĆSolution Explorer„Äć‚Üí„ÄĆSYSTEM„Äć‚Üí„ÄĆLicense„Äć„āíťĖč„Āć, „ÄĆ7 Days Trial License ‚Ä¶„Äć„āí„āĮ„É™„ÉÉ„āĮ„Āó, ÁĒĽťĚĘ„ĀęŤ°®Á§ļ„Āē„āĆ„āčśĖáŚ≠ó„āíŚÖ•Śäõ„Āô„āč. „Ā™„Āä, „É©„ā§„āĽ„É≥„āĻ„ĀĮ7śó•ťĖďťôźŚģö„Āģ„Éą„É©„ā§„āĘ„Éę„É©„ā§„āĽ„É≥„āĻ„Ā†„ĀĆ, Śąá„āĆ„Āü„āČŚÜć„Ā≥ŚźĆ„ĀėšĹúś•≠„āíŤ°Ć„ĀÜ„Āď„Ā®„ĀßŚÜćÁôļŤ°Ć„Āß„Āć„āč. „É©„ā§„āĽ„É≥„āĻ„āíÁôļŤ°Ć„ĀóÁĶā„āŹ„Ā£„Āü„āČ, ‚ÄúTwinCAT XAE Shell‚Äú„āíťĖČ„Āė„Ā¶, ŚÜć„Ā≥ŚģüŤ°Ć„Āô„āč.

TwinCAT„É™„É≥„āĮ

Install

cargo add autd3-link-twincat
target_link_libraries(<TARGET> PRIVATE autd3::link::twincat)

„É°„ā§„É≥„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„ĀęŚźę„Āĺ„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

„É°„ā§„É≥„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„ĀęŚźę„Āĺ„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

„É°„ā§„É≥„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„ĀęŚźę„Āĺ„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

APIs

use autd3_link_twincat::TwinCAT;

fn main() {
let _ = 
TwinCAT::new();
}
#include "autd3/link/twincat.hpp"

int main() {
using namespace autd3;
link::TwinCAT();
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp.Link;

new TwinCAT();

from pyautd3.link.twincat import TwinCAT

TwinCAT()

„Éą„É©„ÉĖ„Éę„ā∑„É•„Éľ„ÉÜ„ā£„É≥„āį

Ś§ßťáŹ„Āģ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āó„āą„ĀÜ„Ā®„Āô„āč„Ā®, šłč„ĀģŚõ≥„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„Ā™„ā®„É©„Éľ„ĀĆÁôļÁĒü„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®„ĀĆ„Āā„āč.

„Āď„ĀģŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ, AUTD3 Server„ĀģSync0 cycle time„Ā®Send task cycle time„ĀģŚÄ§„āíŚĘó„āĄ„Āó, AUTD Server„āíŚÜć„Ā≥ŚģüŤ°Ć„Āô„āč. „Āď„āĆ„āČ„Āģ„ā™„Éó„ā∑„Éß„É≥„ĀģŚÄ§„ĀĮ„Éá„Éē„ā©„Éę„Éą„Āß„ĀĚ„āĆ„Āě„āĆ1ms„Āę„Ā™„Ā£„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

„Ā©„ĀģÁ®čŚļ¶„ĀģŚÄ§„Āę„Āô„āĆ„Āį„ĀĄ„ĀĄ„Āč„ĀĮśé•Á∂ö„Āô„āčŚŹįśēį„Āę„āą„āč. „ā®„É©„Éľ„ĀĆŚáļ„Ā™„ĀĄšł≠„ĀßŚŹĮŤÉĹ„Ā™ťôź„āäŚįŹ„Āē„Ā™ŚÄ§„ĀĆśúõ„Āĺ„Āó„ĀĄ. šĺč„Āą„Āį, 9ŚŹį„ĀģŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ1.5‚Äď2msÁ®čŚļ¶„ĀģŚÄ§„Āę„Āó„Ā¶„Āä„ĀĎ„ĀįŚčēšĹú„Āô„āč„ĀĮ„Āö„Āß„Āā„āč.

Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

SOEM

SOEM„ĀĮśúČŚŅó„ĀĆťĖčÁôļ„Āó„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč„ā™„Éľ„Éó„É≥„āĹ„Éľ„āĻ„ĀģEherCAT Master„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„Āß„Āā„āč. TwinCAT„Ā®„ĀĮÁēį„Ā™„āä„É™„āĘ„Éę„āŅ„ā§„É†śÄß„ĀĮšŅĚŤ®ľ„Āē„āĆ„Ā™„ĀĄ. „ĀĚ„Āģ„Āü„āĀ, Śüļśú¨ÁöĄ„ĀęTwinCAT„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®„āíśé®Ś•®„Āô„āč. SOEM„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„Āģ„ĀĮ„āĄ„āÄ„āíŚĺó„Ā™„ĀĄÁźÜÁĒĪ„ĀĆ„Āā„āč„Āč, ťĖčÁôļśôā„Āģ„ĀŅ„ĀęťôźŚģö„Āô„āč„ĀĻ„Āć„Āß„Āā„āč. šłÄśĖĻ, SOEM„ĀĮ„āĮ„É≠„āĻ„Éó„É©„ÉÉ„Éą„Éē„ā©„Éľ„É†„ĀßŚčēšĹú„Āó, „ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę„āāŚćėÁīĒ„Ā®„ĀĄ„ĀÜŚą©ÁāĻ„ĀĆ„Āā„āč.

Windows„ĀģŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ, npcap„āí„ÄĆWinPcap API compatible mode„Äć„Āß„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę„Āó„Ā¶„Āä„ĀŹ„Āď„Ā®. Linux/macOS„ĀģŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ, ÁČĻ„ĀęśļĖŚāô„ĀĮŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„Ā™„ĀĄ.

Install

cargo add autd3-link-soem
if(WIN32)
  FetchContent_Declare(
    autd3-link-soem
    URL https://github.com/shinolab/autd3-cpp-link-soem/releases/download/v30.0.1/autd3-link-soem-v30.0.1-win-x64.zip
  )
elseif(APPLE)
  FetchContent_Declare(
    autd3-link-soem
    URL https://github.com/shinolab/autd3-cpp-link-soem/releases/download/v30.0.1/autd3-link-soem-v30.0.1-macos-aarch64.tar.gz
  )
else()
  FetchContent_Declare(
    autd3-link-soem
    URL https://github.com/shinolab/autd3-cpp-link-soem/releases/download/v30.0.1/autd3-link-soem-v30.0.1-linux-x64.tar.gz
  )
endif()
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(autd3-link-soem)
target_link_libraries(<TARGET> PRIVATE autd3::link::soem)

dotnet add package AUTD3Sharp.Link.SOEM

https://github.com/shinolab/AUTD3Sharp.Link.SOEM.git#upm/latest„āíUnity Package Manager„ĀßŤŅĹŚä†„Āô„āč. 

pip install pyautd3_link_soem

APIs

Á¨¨1Śľēśēį„Āę„ĀĮ„ā®„É©„Éľ„ĀĆŤĶ∑„Āć„Āü„Ā®„Āć„Āģ„ā≥„Éľ„Éę„Éź„ÉÉ„āĮťĖĘśēį„āí, Á¨¨2Śľēśēį„Āę„ĀĮ„ā™„Éó„ā∑„Éß„É≥„āíśĆáŚģö„Āô„āč.

#[cfg(target_os = "windows")]
use autd3_link_soem::ProcessPriority;
use autd3_link_soem::{Status, SyncMode, ThreadPriority, TimerStrategy, SOEM, SOEMOption};
use std::num::NonZeroUsize;
use std::time::Duration;

fn main() {
let _ = 
SOEM::new(
    |slave, status| {
        eprintln!("slave [{}]: {}", slave, status);
        if status == Status::Lost {
            std::process::exit(-1);
        }
    },
    SOEMOption {
        buf_size: NonZeroUsize::new(32).unwrap(),
        timer_strategy: TimerStrategy::SpinSleep,
        sync_mode: SyncMode::DC,
        ifname: String::new(),
        state_check_interval: Duration::from_millis(100),
        sync0_cycle: Duration::from_millis(1),
        send_cycle: Duration::from_millis(1),
        thread_priority: ThreadPriority::Max,
        #[cfg(target_os = "windows")]
        process_priority: ProcessPriority::High,
        sync_tolerance: Duration::from_micros(1),
        sync_timeout: Duration::from_secs(10),
    },
);
}
#include <iostream>
#include <autd3_link_soem.hpp>

int main() {
using namespace autd3;
link::SOEM(
    [](const uint16_t slave, const link::Status status) {
      std::cout << "slave [" << slave << "]: " << status << std::endl;
      if (status == link::Status::Lost()) {
        exit(-1);
      }
    },
    link::SOEMOption{
        .buf_size = 32,
        .timer_strategy = link::TimerStrategy::SpinSleep,
        .sync_mode = link::SyncMode::DC,
        .ifname = "",
        .state_check_interval = std::chrono::milliseconds(100),
        .sync0_cycle = std::chrono::milliseconds(1),
        .send_cycle = std::chrono::milliseconds(1),
        .thread_priority = link::ThreadPriority::Max(),
        .process_priority = link::ProcessPriority::High,
        .sync_tolerance = std::chrono::microseconds(1),
        .sync_timeout = std::chrono::seconds(10),

    });
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Link;

using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
new SOEM(
    errHandler: (slave, status) =>
    {
        Console.Error.WriteLine($"slave [{slave}]: {status}");
        if (status == Status.Lost)
            Environment.Exit(-1);
    },
    option: new SOEMOption
    {
        BufSize = 32,
        TimerStrategy = TimerStrategy.SpinSleep,
        SyncMode = SyncMode.DC,
        Ifname = "",
        StateCheckInterval = Duration.FromMillis(100),
        Sync0Cycle = Duration.FromMillis(1),
        SendCycle = Duration.FromMillis(1),
        ThreadPriority = AUTD3Sharp.Link.ThreadPriority.Max,
        ProcessPriority = ProcessPriority.High,
        SyncTolerance = Duration.FromMicros(1),
        SyncTimeout = Duration.FromSecs(10),
    }
);

import os
from pyautd3 import Duration
from pyautd3_link_soem import (
    SOEM,
    ProcessPriority,
    SOEMOption,
    Status,
    SyncMode,
    ThreadPriority,
    TimerStrategy,
)


def err_handler(slave: int, status: Status) -> None:
    print(f"slave [{slave}]: {status}")
    if status == Status.Lost():
        os._exit(-1)


SOEM(
    err_handler=err_handler,
    option=SOEMOption(
        buf_size=32,
        timer_strategy=TimerStrategy.SpinSleep,
        sync_mode=SyncMode.DC,
        ifname="",
        state_check_interval=Duration.from_millis(100),
        sync0_cycle=Duration.from_millis(1),
        send_cycle=Duration.from_millis(1),
        thread_priority=ThreadPriority.Max,
        process_priority=ProcessPriority.High,  # only available on Windows
        sync_tolerance=Duration.from_micros(1),
        sync_timeout=Duration.from_secs(10),
    ),
)

SOEM„É™„É≥„āĮ„ĀßśĆáŚģö„Āß„Āć„āč„ā™„Éó„ā∑„Éß„É≥„ĀĮšĽ•šłč„ĀģťÄö„āä„Āß„Āā„āč. „Éá„Éē„ā©„Éę„ÉąŚÄ§„ĀĮšłäŤ®ė„ĀģťÄö„āä.

  • buf_size: ťÄĀšŅ°„ā≠„É•„Éľ„Éź„ÉÉ„Éē„ā°„āĶ„ā§„āļ. ťÄöŚłł„ĀĮŚ§Čśõī„Āô„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĮ„Ā™„ĀĄ.
  • timer_strategy: „āŅ„ā§„Éě„Éľ„Āģśą¶Áē•
    • StdSleep : ś®ôśļĖ„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„Āģsleep„āíÁĒ®„ĀĄ„āč
    • SpinSleep : spin_sleep crate„āíÁĒ®„ĀĄ„āč. OS„Éć„ā§„ÉÜ„ā£„ÉĖ„Āģ„āĻ„É™„Éľ„Éó (Windows„ĀģŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮWaitableTimer) „Ā®„āĻ„ÉĒ„É≥„Éę„Éľ„Éó„āíÁĶĄ„ĀŅŚźą„āŹ„Āõ.
    • SpinWait : „āĻ„ÉĒ„É≥„Éę„Éľ„Éó„āíÁĒ®„ĀĄ„āč. ťęėŤß£ŚÉŹŚļ¶„Ā†„ĀĆ, CPUŤ≤†Ťć∑„ĀĆťęė„ĀĄ.
  • sync_mode: ŚźĆśúü„ÉĘ„Éľ„ÉČ
  • ifname: „Éć„ÉÉ„Éą„ÉĮ„Éľ„āĮ„ā§„É≥„āŅ„Éē„āß„Éľ„āĻŚźć. Á©ļÁôĹ„ĀģŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮAUTD3„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀĆśé•Á∂ö„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč„Éć„ÉÉ„Éą„ÉĮ„Éľ„āĮ„ā§„É≥„āŅ„Éē„āß„Éľ„āĻ„āíŤá™ŚčēÁöĄ„ĀęťĀłśäě„Āô„āč.
  • state_check_interval: „ā®„É©„Éľ„ĀĆŚáļ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč„Āč„Ā©„ĀÜ„Āč„āíÁĘļŤ™ć„Āô„āčťĖďťöĒ
  • sync0_cycle: ŚźĆśúüšŅ°ŚŹ∑„ĀģŚĎ®śúü
  • send_cycle: ťÄĀšŅ°„āĶ„ā§„āĮ„Éę
    • SOEM„āāŚ§ßťáŹ„Āģ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„āíśé•Á∂ö„Āô„āč„Ā®śĆôŚčē„ĀĆšłćŚģČŚģö„Āę„Ā™„āčŚ†īŚźą„ĀĆ„Āā„āč1. „Āď„Āģ„Ā®„Āć„ĀĮ, sync0_cycle„Ā®send_cycle„ĀģŚÄ§„āíŚĘó„āĄ„Āô. „Āď„āĆ„āČŚÄ§„ĀĮ„ā®„É©„Éľ„ĀĆŚáļ„Ā™„ĀĄšł≠„Āß, ŚŹĮŤÉĹ„Ā™ťôź„āäŚįŹ„Āē„Ā™ŚÄ§„ĀĆśúõ„Āĺ„Āó„ĀĄ. „Ā©„ĀģÁ®čŚļ¶„ĀģŚÄ§„Āę„Āô„ĀĻ„Āć„Āč„ĀĮśé•Á∂ö„Āó„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āčŚŹįśēį„ĀęšĺĚŚ≠ė„Āô„āč. šĺč„Āą„Āį, 9ŚŹį„ĀģŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ1.5‚ąí2msÁ®čŚļ¶„ĀģŚÄ§„Āę„Āó„Ā¶„Āä„ĀĎ„ĀįŚčēšĹú„Āô„āč„ĀĮ„Āö„Āß„Āā„āč.
  • thread_priority: „āĻ„É¨„ÉÉ„ÉČ„ĀģŚĄ™ŚÖąŚļ¶
  • process_priority: (Windows„Āģ„ĀŅ) „Éó„É≠„āĽ„āĻ„ĀģŚĄ™ŚÖąŚļ¶
  • sync_tolerance: ŚźĆśúüŤ®ĪŚģĻ„É¨„Éô„Éę. ŚąĚśúüŚĆĖśôā, ŚźĄ„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„Āģ„ā∑„āĻ„ÉÜ„É†śôāťĖďŚ∑ģ„ĀĆ„Āď„ĀģŚÄ§šĽ•šłč„Āę„Ā™„āč„Āĺ„ĀßŚĺÖś©ü„Āô„āč. šĽ•šłč„Āģ„āŅ„ā§„É†„āĘ„ā¶„ÉąśôāťĖď„ĀĆÁĶĆťĀé„Āó„Ā¶„āāŚźĆśúü„ĀĆŚģĆšļÜ„Āó„Ā™„ĀĄŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ„ā®„É©„Éľ„Ā®„Ā™„āč. „Āď„ĀģŚÄ§„āíŚ§Čśõī„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®„ĀĮśé®Ś•®„Āē„āĆ„Ā™„ĀĄ.
  • sync_timeout: ŚźĆśúü„āŅ„ā§„É†„āĘ„ā¶„Éą. šłäŤ®ė„Āģ„ā∑„āĻ„ÉÜ„É†śôāťĖďŚ∑ģśł¨Śģö„Āģ„āŅ„ā§„É†„āĘ„ā¶„ÉąśôāťĖď.
1

TwinCAT„āą„āä„ĀĮÁ∑©„ĀŹ, śôģťÄö„ĀęŚčē„ĀŹ„Āď„Ā®„āā„Āā„āč.

Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

Simulator

Simulator link„ĀĮAUTD„ā∑„Éü„É•„É¨„Éľ„āŅ„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āčťöõ„ĀęšĹŅ„ĀÜLink„Āß„Āā„āč.

„Āď„Āģlink„ĀģšĹŅÁĒ®„ĀģŚČć„Āę, AUTD„ā∑„Éü„É•„É¨„Éľ„āŅ„āíŤĶ∑Śčē„Āó„Ā¶„Āä„ĀŹŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč.

Install

cargo add autd3-link-simulator --features blocking
target_link_libraries(<TARGET> PRIVATE autd3::link::simulator)

„É°„ā§„É≥„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„ĀęŚźę„Āĺ„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

„É°„ā§„É≥„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„ĀęŚźę„Āĺ„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

„É°„ā§„É≥„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„ĀęŚźę„Āĺ„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

APIs

Simulator„Āģ„ā≥„É≥„āĻ„Éą„É©„āĮ„āŅ„Āę„ĀĮAUTD„ā∑„Éü„É•„É¨„Éľ„āŅ„ĀģIP„āĘ„ÉČ„É¨„āĻ„Ā®„ÉĚ„Éľ„ÉąÁē™ŚŹ∑„āíśĆáŚģö„Āô„āč.

use autd3_link_simulator::Simulator;

fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
let _ = 
Simulator::new("127.0.0.1:8080".parse()?);
Ok(())
}
#include "autd3/link/simulator.hpp"

int main() {
using namespace autd3;
link::Simulator("127.0.0.1:8080");
return 0; }

using System.Net;
using AUTD3Sharp.Link;

new Simulator(new IPEndPoint(IPAddress.Parse("127.0.0.1"), 8080));

from pyautd3.link.simulator import Simulator

Simulator("127.0.0.1:8080")
Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

RemoteTwinCAT

ŚČćŤŅį„ĀģťÄö„āä, AUTD3„Ā®TwinCAT„āíšĹŅ„ĀÜŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮWindows OS„Ā®ÁČĻŚģö„Āģ„Éć„ÉÉ„Éą„ÉĮ„Éľ„āĮ„āĘ„ÉÄ„Éó„āŅ„ĀĆŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„Āę„Ā™„āč. WindowsšĽ•Ś§Ė„ĀģPC„ĀßťĖčÁôļ„Āó„Āü„ĀĄŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ, RemoteTwinCAT link„āíÁĒ®„ĀĄ„Ā¶Linux/macOS„Āč„āČťĀ†ťöĒ„ĀßTwinCAT„āíśďćšĹú„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®„ĀĆ„Āß„Āć„āč.

Install

cargo add autd3-link-twincat --features remote
target_link_libraries(<TARGET> PRIVATE autd3::link::twincat)

„É°„ā§„É≥„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„ĀęŚźę„Āĺ„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

„É°„ā§„É≥„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„ĀęŚźę„Āĺ„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

„É°„ā§„É≥„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„ĀęŚźę„Āĺ„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

„āĽ„ÉÉ„Éą„āĘ„ÉÉ„Éó

RemoteTwinCAT„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āčŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮPC„āí2ŚŹįÁĒ®śĄŹ„Āô„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč. „Āď„Āģśôā, ÁČáśĖĻ„ĀģPC„ĀĮTwinCAT„ĀĆšĹŅ„Āą„āčPC„Āß„Āā„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč. „Āď„ĀģPC„āí„Āď„Āď„Āß„ĀĮ‚Äú„āĶ„Éľ„Éź‚Äú„Ā®ŚĎľ„Ā∂. šłÄśĖĻ, ťĖčÁôļŚĀī„ĀģPC, Ść≥„Ā°SDK„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āčŚĀī„ĀĮÁČĻ„ĀęŚą∂ÁīĄ„ĀĮ„Ā™„ĀŹ, „āĶ„Éľ„Éź„Ā®ŚźĆ„ĀėLAN„ĀęÁĻč„ĀĆ„Ā£„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āĆ„ĀįŤČĮ„ĀĄ, „Āď„Ā°„āČ„āí„Āď„Āď„Āß„ĀĮ‚Äú„āĮ„É©„ā§„āĘ„É≥„Éą‚Äú„Ā®ŚĎľ„Ā∂.

„Āĺ„Āö, „āĶ„Éľ„Éź„Ā®AUTD„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„āíśé•Á∂ö„Āô„āč. „Āď„ĀģśôāšĹŅ„ĀÜLAN„Āģ„āĘ„ÉÄ„Éó„āŅ„ĀĮTwinCAT„Ā®ŚźĆ„Āė„ĀŹ, TwinCATŚĮĺŚŅú„Āģ„āĘ„ÉÄ„Éó„āŅ„Āß„Āā„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč. „Āĺ„Āü, „āĶ„Éľ„Éź„Ā®„āĮ„É©„ā§„āĘ„É≥„Éą„āíŚą•„ĀģLAN„ĀßÁĻč„Āź. „Āď„Ā°„āČ„ĀģLAN„āĘ„ÉÄ„Éó„āŅ„ĀĮTwinCATŚĮĺŚŅú„Āß„Āā„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĮ„Ā™„ĀĄ1. „ĀĚ„Āó„Ā¶, „āĶ„Éľ„Éź„Ā®„āĮ„É©„ā§„āĘ„É≥„ÉąťĖď„ĀģLAN„ĀģIP„āíÁĘļŤ™ć„Āó„Ā¶„Āä„ĀŹ. „Āď„Āď„Āß„ĀĮšĺč„Āą„Āį, „āĶ„Éľ„ÉźŚĀī„ĀĆ172.16.99.104, „āĮ„É©„ā§„āĘ„É≥„ÉąŚĀī„ĀĆ172.16.99.62„Ā†„Ā£„Āü„Ā®„Āô„āč. ś¨°„Āę, „āĶ„Éľ„Éź„ĀßAUTD Server„āíŤĶ∑Śčē„Āô„āč. „Āď„Āģśôā, Client IP address„Āę„āĮ„É©„ā§„āĘ„É≥„Éą„ĀģIP„āĘ„ÉČ„É¨„āĻ („Āď„Āģšĺč„Ā†„Ā®172.16.99.62) „āíśĆáŚģö„Āô„āč.

ŚŹ≥ŚĀī„ĀģÁĒĽťĚĘ„Āę, „ÄĆServer AmsNetId„Äć„Ā®„ÄĆClient AmsNetId„Äć„ĀĆŤ°®Á§ļ„Āē„āĆ„āč„Āģ„Āß, „Āď„āĆ„āí„É°„ÉĘ„Ā£„Ā¶„Āä„ĀŹ.

NOTE: „ÄĆServer AmsNetId„Äć„ĀģśúÄŚąĚ„Āģ4ś°Ā„ĀĮŚŅÖ„Āö„Āó„āāServer„ĀģIP„āĘ„ÉČ„É¨„āĻ„āíśĄŹŚĎ≥„Āó„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč„āŹ„ĀĎ„Āß„ĀĮ„Ā™„ĀĄ„Āģ„Āßś≥®śĄŹ„Āē„āĆ„Āü„ĀĄ.

APIs

RemoteTwinCAT„Āģ„ā≥„É≥„āĻ„Éą„É©„āĮ„āŅ„Āę„ĀĮ„ÄĆServer AmsNetId„Äć„āíśĆáŚģö„Āô„āč.

„Āĺ„Āü, server_ip„Ā®client_ams_net_id„Āß„āĶ„Éľ„Éź„Éľ„ĀģIP„āĘ„ÉČ„É¨„āĻ„Ā®„āĮ„É©„ā§„āĘ„É≥„Éą„ĀģNetId„āíśĆáŚģö„Āô„āč. „Āď„āĆ„āČ„ĀĮÁúĀÁē•„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®„āāŚŹĮŤÉĹ„Ā†„ĀĆ, Śüļśú¨ÁöĄ„Āę„ĀĮśĆáŚģö„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®„āíśé®Ś•®„Āô„āč.

use autd3_link_twincat::remote::{RemoteTwinCAT, RemoteTwinCATOption};

fn main() {
let _ = 
RemoteTwinCAT::new("172.16.99.111.1.1", RemoteTwinCATOption {
    server_ip: "172.16.99.104".to_string(),
    client_ams_net_id: "172.16.99.62.1.1".to_string(),
});
}
#include "autd3/link/twincat.hpp"

int main() {
using namespace autd3;
link::RemoteTwinCAT("172.16.99.111.1.1",
                    link::RemoteTwinCATOption{
                        .server_ip = "172.16.99.104",
                        .client_ams_net_id = "172.16.99.62.1.1"});
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Link;

new RemoteTwinCAT(
        serverAmsNetId: "172.16.99.111.1.1",
        option: new RemoteTwinCATOption
        {
                ServerIp = "172.16.99.104",
                ClientAmsNetId = "172.16.99.62.1.1"
        }
);

from pyautd3.link.twincat import RemoteTwinCAT, RemoteTwinCATOption

RemoteTwinCAT(
    server_ams_net_id="172.16.99.111.1.1",
    option=RemoteTwinCATOption(
        server_ip="172.16.99.104",
        client_ams_net_id="172.16.99.62.1.1",
    ),
)

„Éē„ā°„ā§„āĘ„ā¶„ā©„Éľ„Éę

TCPťĖĘšŅā„Āģ„ā®„É©„Éľ„ĀĆŚáļ„āčŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ, „Éē„ā°„ā§„āĘ„ā¶„ā©„Éľ„Éę„ĀßADS„Éó„É≠„Éą„ā≥„Éę„ĀĆ„ÉĖ„É≠„ÉÉ„āĮ„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āčŚŹĮŤÉĹśÄß„ĀĆ„Āā„āč. „ĀĚ„ĀģŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ, „Éē„ā°„ā§„āĘ„ā¶„ā©„Éľ„Éę„ĀģŤ®≠Śģö„ĀßTCP/UDP„Āģ48898Áē™„ÉĚ„Éľ„Éą„Āģśé•Á∂ö„āíŤ®ĪŚŹĮ„Āô„āč.

1

ÁĄ°Á∑öLAN„Āß„āāŚŹĮ

Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

RemoteSOEM

„Āď„ĀģLink„ĀĮSOEM„āíŚčē„Āč„Āô„āĶ„Éľ„Éź„ÉľPC„Ā®„É¶„Éľ„ā∂„Éó„É≠„āį„É©„É†„āíŚčē„Āč„Āô„āĮ„É©„ā§„āĘ„É≥„ÉąPC„āíŚąÜťõĘ„Āô„āč„Āü„āĀ„Āģ„āā„Āģ„Āß„Āā„āč.

Install

cargo add autd3-link-soem --features "remote blocking"
if(WIN32)
  FetchContent_Declare(
    autd3-link-soem
    URL https://github.com/shinolab/autd3-cpp-link-soem/releases/download/v30.0.1/autd3-link-soem-v30.0.1-win-x64.zip
  )
elseif(APPLE)
  FetchContent_Declare(
    autd3-link-soem
    URL https://github.com/shinolab/autd3-cpp-link-soem/releases/download/v30.0.1/autd3-link-soem-v30.0.1-macos-aarch64.tar.gz
  )
else()
  FetchContent_Declare(
    autd3-link-soem
    URL https://github.com/shinolab/autd3-cpp-link-soem/releases/download/v30.0.1/autd3-link-soem-v30.0.1-linux-x64.tar.gz
  )
endif()
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(autd3-link-soem)
target_link_libraries(<TARGET> PRIVATE autd3::link::soem)

dotnet add package AUTD3Sharp.Link.SOEM

https://github.com/shinolab/AUTD3Sharp.Link.SOEM.git#upm/latest„āíUnity Package Manager„ĀßŤŅĹŚä†„Āô„āč. 

pip install pyautd3_link_soem

„āĽ„ÉÉ„Éą„āĘ„ÉÉ„Éó

RemoteSOEM„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āčŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮPC„āí2ŚŹįÁĒ®śĄŹ„Āô„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč. „Āď„Āģśôā, ÁČáśĖĻ„ĀģPC„ĀĮSOEM„ĀĆšĹŅ„Āą„āčPC„Āß„Āā„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč. „Āď„ĀģPC„āí„Āď„Āď„Āß„ĀĮ‚Äú„āĶ„Éľ„Éź‚Äú„Ā®ŚĎľ„Ā∂. šłÄśĖĻ, ťĖčÁôļŚĀī„ĀģPC, Ść≥„Ā°SDK„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āčŚĀī„ĀĮÁČĻ„ĀęŚą∂ÁīĄ„ĀĮ„Ā™„ĀŹ, „āĶ„Éľ„Éź„Ā®ŚźĆ„ĀėLAN„ĀęÁĻč„ĀĆ„Ā£„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āĆ„ĀįŤČĮ„ĀĄ, „Āď„Ā°„āČ„āí„Āď„Āď„Āß„ĀĮ‚Äú„āĮ„É©„ā§„āĘ„É≥„Éą‚Äú„Ā®ŚĎľ„Ā∂.

„Āĺ„Āö, „āĶ„Éľ„Éź„Ā®AUTD„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„āíśé•Á∂ö„Āô„āč. „Āĺ„Āü, „āĶ„Éľ„Éź„Ā®„āĮ„É©„ā§„āĘ„É≥„Éą„āíŚą•„ĀģLAN„ĀßÁĻč„Āź1. „ĀĚ„Āó„Ā¶, „āĶ„Éľ„Éź„Ā®„āĮ„É©„ā§„āĘ„É≥„ÉąťĖď„ĀģLAN„ĀģIP„āíÁĘļŤ™ć„Āó„Ā¶„Āä„ĀŹ. „Āď„Āď„Āß„ĀĮšĺč„Āą„Āį, „āĶ„Éľ„ÉźŚĀī„ĀĆ172.16.99.104, „āĮ„É©„ā§„āĘ„É≥„ÉąŚĀī„ĀĆ172.16.99.62„Ā†„Ā£„Āü„Ā®„Āô„āč.

AUTD Server

RemoteSOEM„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āčŚ†īŚźą, „āĶ„Éľ„Éź„ĀęAUTD Server„āí„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę„Āô„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč. GitHub Releases„Āę„Ā¶„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„É©„āíťÖćŚłÉ„Āó„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč„Āģ„Āß, „Āď„āĆ„āí„ÉÄ„ā¶„É≥„É≠„Éľ„ÉČ„Āó, śĆáÁ§ļ„ĀęŚĺď„Ā£„Ā¶„ā§„É≥„āĻ„Éą„Éľ„Éę„Āô„āč.

AUTD Server„āíŚģüŤ°Ć„Āô„āč„Ā®, šĽ•šłč„Āģ„āą„ĀÜ„Ā™ÁĒĽťĚĘ„Āę„Ā™„āč„Āģ„Āß, SOEM„āŅ„ÉĖ„āíťĖč„ĀŹ.

„ÉĚ„Éľ„Éą„ĀęťĀ©ŚĹď„Ā™„ÉĚ„Éľ„ÉąÁē™ŚŹ∑„āíśĆáŚģö„Āó, Run„Éú„āŅ„É≥„āíśäľ„Āô.

AUTD3„Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀĆŤ¶č„Ā§„Āč„āä, „āĮ„É©„ā§„āĘ„É≥„Éą„Ā®„Āģśé•Á∂öŚĺÖ„Ā°„Āß„Āā„āčśó®„Āģ„É°„ÉÉ„āĽ„Éľ„āł„ĀĆŤ°®Á§ļ„Āē„āĆ„āĆ„ĀįśąźŚäü„Āß„Āā„āč.

„Ā™„Āä, AUTD Server„Āß„ĀĮSOEM„Ā®ŚźĆÁ≠Č„Āģ„ā™„Éó„ā∑„Éß„É≥„āíśĆáŚģö„Āß„Āć„āč.

APIs

RemoteSOEM„Āģ„ā≥„É≥„āĻ„Éą„É©„āĮ„āŅ„Āß„ĀĮ, <„āĶ„Éľ„Éź„ĀģIP:„ÉĚ„Éľ„Éą>„āíśĆáŚģö„Āô„āč.

use autd3_link_soem::RemoteSOEM;

fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
let _ = 
RemoteSOEM::new("172.16.99.104:8080".parse()?);
Ok(())
}
#include <autd3_link_soem.hpp>

int main() {
using namespace autd3;
link::RemoteSOEM("172.16.99.104:8080");
return 0; }

using System.Net;
using AUTD3Sharp.Link;

new RemoteSOEM(new IPEndPoint(IPAddress.Parse("172.16.99.104"), 8080))
;

from pyautd3_link_soem import RemoteSOEM

RemoteSOEM("172.16.99.104:8080")

„Éē„ā°„ā§„āĘ„ā¶„ā©„Éľ„Éę

TCPťĖĘšŅā„Āģ„ā®„É©„Éľ„ĀĆŚáļ„āčŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ, „Éē„ā°„ā§„āĘ„ā¶„ā©„Éľ„Éę„Āß„ÉĖ„É≠„ÉÉ„āĮ„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āčŚŹĮŤÉĹśÄß„ĀĆ„Āā„āč. „ĀĚ„ĀģŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ, „Éē„ā°„ā§„āĘ„ā¶„ā©„Éľ„Éę„ĀģŤ®≠Śģö„ĀßTCP/UDP„ĀģśĆáŚģö„Āó„Āü„ÉĚ„Éľ„Éą„Āģśé•Á∂ö„āíŤ®ĪŚŹĮ„Āô„āč.

1

ÁĄ°Á∑öLAN„Āß„āāŚŹĮ

Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

Gain

AUTD„ĀĮŚźĄśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀģšĹćÁõł/śĆĮŚĻÖ„āíŚÄčŚą•„ĀęŚą∂Śĺ°„Āô„āč„Āď„Ā®„ĀĆ„Āß„Āć, „Āď„āĆ„Āę„āą„Ā£„Ā¶śßė„ÄÖ„Ā™ťü≥Ś†ī„āíÁĒüśąź„Āß„Āć„āč. Gain„ĀĮ„Āď„āĆ„āíÁģ°ÁźÜ„Āô„āč„āĮ„É©„āĻ„Āß„Āā„āä, SDK„Āę„ĀĮ„Éá„Éē„ā©„Éę„Éą„Āß„ĀĄ„ĀŹ„Ā§„Āč„ĀģÁ®ģť°ě„Āģťü≥Ś†ī„āíÁĒüśąź„Āô„āč„Āü„āĀ„ĀģGain„ĀĆÁĒ®śĄŹ„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

  • Null ‚Äź šĹē„āāŚáļŚäõ„Āó„Ā™„ĀĄ
  • Focus - ŚćėšłÄÁĄ¶ÁāĻ
  • Bessel - „Éô„ÉÉ„āĽ„Éę„Éď„Éľ„É†
  • Plane - ŚĻ≥ťĚĘś≥Ę
  • Uniform - „Āô„ĀĻ„Ā¶„ĀģśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„āíŚźĆ„ĀėšĹćÁõł/śĆĮŚĻÖ„ĀßťßÜŚčē
  • Custom - „É¶„Éľ„ā∂„Éľ„ĀĆŤá™ÁĒĪ„ĀęšĹćÁõł/śĆĮŚĻÖ„āíśĆáŚģö„Āß„Āć„āč
  • Group - śĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„āí„āį„Éę„Éľ„ÉóŚĆĖ„Āó„Ā¶, ŚźĄ„āį„Éę„Éľ„ÉóśĮé„ĀęÁēį„Ā™„āčGain„āíťĀ©ÁĒ®
  • Holo - Ś§öÁĄ¶ÁāĻťü≥Ś†ī
  • Cache - Gain„ĀģŤ®ąÁģóÁĶźśěú„āí„ā≠„É£„ÉÉ„ā∑„É•„Āô„āč
Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

Null

Source

Null„ĀĮśĆĮŚĻÖ0„ĀģGain„Āß„Āā„āč.

use autd3::prelude::*;
fn main() {
let _ = 
Null {};
}
#include<autd3.hpp>
int main() {
using namespace autd3;
Null{};
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp.Gain;
new Null();

from pyautd3 import Null
Null()

Focus

Source

Focus„ĀĮŚćėšłÄÁĄ¶ÁāĻ„āíÁĒüśąź„Āô„āč.

use autd3::prelude::*;
fn main() {
let x = 0.;
let y = 0.;
let z = 0.;
let _ = 
Focus {
    pos: Point3::new(x, y, z),
    option: FocusOption {
        intensity: EmitIntensity::MAX,
        phase_offset: Phase::ZERO,
    },
};
}
#include<autd3.hpp>
int main() {
using namespace autd3;
const auto x = 0.0;
const auto y = 0.0;
const auto z = 0.0;
Focus(Point3(x, y, z),
      FocusOption{
          .intensity = std::numeric_limits<EmitIntensity>::max(),
          .phase_offset = Phase::zero(),
      });
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
using AUTD3Sharp.Gain;
var x = 0.0f;
var y = 0.0f;
var z = 0.0f;
new Focus(
    pos: new Point3(x, y, z),
    option: new FocusOption
    {
        Intensity = EmitIntensity.Max,
        PhaseOffset = Phase.Zero
    }
);

from pyautd3 import EmitIntensity, Focus, FocusOption, Phase

x = 1.0
y = 0.0
z = 0.0
Focus(
    pos=[x, y, z],
    option=FocusOption(
        intensity=EmitIntensity.MAX,
        phase_offset=Phase.ZERO,
    ),
)

„ā™„Éó„ā∑„Éß„É≥„Āę„Ā¶, ŚáļŚäõśĆĮŚĻÖ„Ā®šĹćÁõł„ā™„Éē„āĽ„ÉÉ„Éą„āíśĆáŚģö„Āß„Āć„āč. „Éá„Éē„ā©„Éę„ÉąŚÄ§„ĀĮšłäŤ®ė„ĀģťÄö„āä.

Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

Bessel

Source

Bessel„Āß„ĀĮBessel beam„āíÁĒüśąź„Āô„āč. „Āď„ĀģGain„ĀĮťē∑Ťį∑Ś∑Ě„āČ„ĀģŤęĖśĖá1„ĀęŚüļ„Ā•„ĀŹ.

use autd3::prelude::*;
fn main() {
let x = 0.;
let y = 0.;
let z = 0.;
let nx = 0.;
let ny = 0.;
let nz = 0.;
let theta = 0. * rad;
let _ = 
Bessel {
    pos: Point3::new(x, y, z),
    dir: UnitVector3::new_normalize(Vector3::new(nx, ny, nz)),
    theta,
    option: BesselOption {
        intensity: EmitIntensity::MAX,
        phase_offset: Phase::ZERO,
    },
};
}
#include<autd3.hpp>
int main() {
using namespace autd3;
const auto x = 0.0;
const auto y = 0.0;
const auto z = 0.0;
const auto nx = 0.0;
const auto ny = 0.0;
const auto nz = 1.0;
const auto theta = 0.0;
Bessel(Point3(x, y, z), Vector3(nx, ny, nz), theta* rad,
       BesselOption{
           .intensity = std::numeric_limits<EmitIntensity>::max(),
           .phase_offset = Phase::zero(),
       });
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
using AUTD3Sharp.Gain;
using static AUTD3Sharp.Units;
var x = 0.0f;
var y = 0.0f;
var z = 0.0f;
var nx = 0.0f;
var ny = 0.0f;
var nz = 1.0f;
var theta = 0.0f;
new Bessel(
    pos: new Point3(x, y, z),
    dir: new Vector3(nx, ny, nz),
    theta: theta * rad,
    option: new BesselOption
    {
        Intensity = EmitIntensity.Max,
        PhaseOffset = Phase.Zero
    }
);

from pyautd3 import Bessel, BesselOption, EmitIntensity, Phase, rad

x = 0.0
y = 0.0
z = 0.0
nx = 1.0
ny = 0.0
nz = 0.0
theta = 0.0
Bessel(
    pos=[x, y, z],
    direction=[nx, ny, nz],
    theta=theta * rad,
    option=BesselOption(
        intensity=EmitIntensity.MAX,
        phase_offset=Phase.ZERO,
    ),
)

„Āď„Āď„Āß, pos„ĀĮ„Éď„Éľ„É†„āíÁĒüśąź„Āô„āčšĽģśÉ≥ŚÜÜťĆź (šłčŚõ≥„ĀģÁāĻÁ∑ö) „Āģť†āÁāĻ„Āß„Āā„āä, dir„ĀĮ„Éď„Éľ„É†„ĀģśĖĻŚźĎ, theta„ĀĮ„Éď„Éľ„É†„ĀęŚěāÁõī„Ā™ťĚĘ„Ā®„Éď„Éľ„É†„āíÁĒüśąź„Āô„āčšĽģśÉ≥ŚÜÜťĆź„ĀģŚĀīťĚĘ„Ā®„Ā™„ĀôŤßíŚļ¶„Āß„Āā„āč (šłčŚõ≥„Āģőłz‚Äč).

„ā™„Éó„ā∑„Éß„É≥„Āę„Ā¶, ŚáļŚäõśĆĮŚĻÖ„Ā®šĹćÁõł„ā™„Éē„āĽ„ÉÉ„Éą„āíśĆáŚģö„Āß„Āć„āč. „Éá„Éē„ā©„Éę„ÉąŚÄ§„ĀĮšłäŤ®ė„ĀģťÄö„āä.

1

Hasegawa, Keisuke, et al. ‚ÄúElectronically steerable ultrasound-driven long narrow air stream.‚ÄĚ Applied Physics Letters 111.6 (2017): 064104.

Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

Plane

Source

Plane„ĀĮŚĻ≥ťĚĘś≥Ę„āíŚáļŚäõ„Āô„āč.

use autd3::prelude::*;
fn main() {
let nx = 0.;
let ny = 0.;
let nz = 0.;
let _ = 
Plane {
    dir: UnitVector3::new_normalize(Vector3::new(nx, ny, nz)),
    option: PlaneOption {
        intensity: EmitIntensity::MAX,
        phase_offset: Phase::ZERO,
    },
};
}
#include<autd3.hpp>
int main() {
using namespace autd3;
const auto nx = 0.0;
const auto ny = 0.0;
const auto nz = 1.0;
Plane(Vector3(nx, ny, nz),
      PlaneOption{
          .intensity = std::numeric_limits<EmitIntensity>::max(),
          .phase_offset = Phase::zero(),
      });
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
using AUTD3Sharp.Gain;
var nx = 0.0f;
var ny = 0.0f;
var nz = 1.0f;
new Plane(
    dir: new Vector3(nx, ny, nz),
    option: new PlaneOption
    {
        Intensity = EmitIntensity.Max,
        PhaseOffset = Phase.Zero
    }
);

from pyautd3 import EmitIntensity, Phase, Plane, PlaneOption
nx = 1.0
ny = 0.0
nz = 0.0
Plane(
    direction=[nx, ny, nz],
    option=PlaneOption(
        intensity=EmitIntensity.MAX,
        phase_offset=Phase.ZERO,
    ),
)

„Āď„Āď„Āß, dir„ĀĮŚĻ≥ťĚĘś≥Ę„ĀģśĖĻŚźĎ„Āß„Āā„āč.

„ā™„Éó„ā∑„Éß„É≥„Āę„Ā¶, ŚáļŚäõśĆĮŚĻÖ„Ā®šĹćÁõł„ā™„Éē„āĽ„ÉÉ„Éą„āíśĆáŚģö„Āß„Āć„āč. „Éá„Éē„ā©„Éę„ÉąŚÄ§„ĀĮšłäŤ®ė„ĀģťÄö„āä.

Uniform

Source

Uniform„ĀĮ„Āô„ĀĻ„Ā¶„ĀģśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀęŚźĆ„ĀėšĹćÁõł/śĆĮŚĻÖ„āíŤ®≠Śģö„Āô„āč.

use autd3::prelude::*;
fn main() {
let _ = 
Uniform {
    intensity: EmitIntensity::MAX, 
    phase: Phase::ZERO,
};
}
#include<autd3.hpp>
#include <limits>
int main() {
using namespace autd3;
Uniform(std::numeric_limits<EmitIntensity>::max(), Phase::zero());
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Gain;
new Uniform(
    intensity: EmitIntensity.Max,
    phase: Phase.Zero
);

from pyautd3 import EmitIntensity, Phase, Uniform
Uniform(intensity=EmitIntensity.MAX, phase=Phase.ZERO)

Custom

Source

Custom„ĀĮ„É¶„Éľ„ā∂„Éľ„ĀĆŤá™ÁĒĪ„Āęťü≥Ś†ī„āíÁĒüśąź„Āô„āč„Āü„āĀ„ĀģGain„Āß„Āā„āč.

use autd3::gain::Custom;
use autd3::prelude::*;

fn main() {
let _ =
Custom::new(|_dev| {
    |_tr| Drive {
        phase: Phase::ZERO,
        intensity: EmitIntensity::MIN,
    }
});
}
#include<autd3.hpp>
#include <autd3/gain/custom.hpp>

int main() {
using namespace autd3;
gain::Custom([](const auto& dev) {
  return [](const auto& tr) {
    return Drive(Phase::zero(), std::numeric_limits<EmitIntensity>::min());
  };
});
return 0; }

using System;
using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Gain;
using static AUTD3Sharp.Units;

new Custom(dev => tr => new Drive(Phase.Zero, EmitIntensity.Min));

from pyautd3 import Drive, EmitIntensity, Phase
from pyautd3.gain import Custom

Custom(lambda _dev: lambda _tr: Drive(phase=Phase.ZERO, intensity=EmitIntensity.MIN))

Custom„ā≥„É≥„āĻ„Éą„É©„āĮ„āŅ„ĀģŚľēśēį„ĀĮFn(&Device) -> Fn(&Transducer) -> Drive„Āß„Āā„āč.

Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

Group

Source

Group„ĀĮśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀĒ„Ā®„ĀęŚą•„ÄÖ„ĀģGain„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč„Āü„āĀ„ĀģGain„Āß„Āā„āč.

NOTE: „Éá„Éź„ā§„āĻ„ĀĒ„Ā®„ĀģŚąÜŚČ≤„ĀßŤČĮ„ĀĄ„Āģ„Āß„Āā„āĆ„Āį, Controller::group_send„ĀģšĹŅÁĒ®„āíśé®Ś•®„Āô„āč.

Group„Āß„ĀĮ, śĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀęŚĮĺ„Āó„Ā¶„ā≠„Éľ„āíŚČ≤„āäŚĹď„Ā¶, „ĀĚ„ĀģŚźĄ„ā≠„Éľ„ĀęGain„āíÁīźšĽė„ĀĎ„Ā¶šĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āč.

use autd3::gain::IntoBoxedGain;
use autd3::prelude::*;
use std::collections::HashMap;

fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
let x = 0.;
let y = 0.;
let z = 0.;
let _ =
Group {
    key_map: |_dev| {
        |tr| match tr.idx() {
            0..=100 => Some("null"),
            _ => Some("focus"),
        }
    },
    gain_map: HashMap::from([
        ("null", Null {}.into_boxed()),
        (
            "focus",
            Focus {
                pos: Point3::new(x, y, z),
                option: Default::default(),
            }
            .into_boxed(),
        ),
    ]),
};
Ok(())
}

NOTE: RustÁČą„ĀĮHashMap„ĀģŚÄ§„ĀĆ„Āô„ĀĻ„Ā¶ŚźĆ„ĀėŚěč„Āß„Āā„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč„Āü„āĀ, „Āď„Āď„Āß„ĀĮinto_boxed„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āó„Ā¶, Śěč„āíÁĶĪšłÄ„Āó„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

#include<optional>
#include<autd3.hpp>
int main() {
using namespace autd3;
const auto x = 0.0;
const auto y = 0.0;
const auto z = 0.0;
Group(
    [](const auto& dev) {
      return [](const auto& tr) -> std::optional<const char*> {
        if (tr.idx() <= 100) return "null";
        return "focus";
      };
    },
    std::unordered_map<const char*, std::shared_ptr<Gain>>{
        {"focus", std::make_shared<Focus>(Point3(x, y, z), FocusOption{})},
        {"null", std::make_shared<Null>()}});
return 0; }

NOTE: C++„ĀģŚ†īŚźą, „ā≠„Éľ„Āę„ĀĮstd::optional„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āô„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč. „Āĺ„Āü, Śěč„āíÁĶĪšłÄ„Āô„āč„Āü„āĀ, std::shared_ptr<autd3::Gain>>„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āó„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
using AUTD3Sharp.Gain;
using AUTD3Sharp.Driver.Datagram;
var x = 0.0f;
var y = 0.0f;
var z = 0.0f;
new Group(
    keyMap: dev => tr => tr.Idx() <= 100 ? "null" : "focus",
    gainMap: new Dictionary<object, IGain> {
        { "null", new Null() },
        { "focus", new Focus(pos: new Point3(x, y, z), option: new FocusOption()) }
    }
);

from pyautd3 import Focus, FocusOption, Group, Null
x = 1.0
y = 0.0
z = 0.0
Group(
    key_map=lambda _: lambda tr: "null" if tr.idx() <= 100 else "focus",
    gain_map={"null": Null(), "focus": Focus(pos=[x, y, z], option=FocusOption())},
)

šłä„ĀģŚ†īŚźą„ĀĮ, „É≠„Éľ„āę„Éę„ā§„É≥„Éá„ÉÉ„āĮ„āĻ„ĀĆ0„Āč„āČ100„ĀģśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀĮNull„āí, „ĀĚ„āĆšĽ•Ś§Ė„ĀģśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀĮFocus„āíŚáļŚäõ„Āô„āč.

NOTE: „Āď„Āģ„āĶ„É≥„Éó„Éę„Āß„ĀĮ, „ā≠„Éľ„Ā®„Āó„Ā¶śĖáŚ≠óŚąó„āíšĹŅÁĒ®„Āó„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč„ĀĆ, HashMap„Āģ„ā≠„Éľ„Ā®„Āó„Ā¶šĹŅÁĒ®„Āß„Āć„āč„āā„Āģ„Ā™„āČšĹē„Āß„āāŤČĮ„ĀĄ.

Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

Holo

Holo„ĀĮŚ§öÁĄ¶ÁāĻ„āíÁĒüśąź„Āô„āč„Āü„āĀ„ĀģGain„Āß„Āā„āč.

Install

cargo add autd3-gain-holo
target_link_libraries(<TARGET> PRIVATE autd3::gain::holo)

„É°„ā§„É≥„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„ĀęŚźę„Āĺ„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

„É°„ā§„É≥„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„ĀęŚźę„Āĺ„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

„É°„ā§„É≥„É©„ā§„ÉĖ„É©„É™„ĀęŚźę„Āĺ„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

APIs

Ś§öÁĄ¶ÁāĻ„āíÁĒüśąź„Āô„āč„āĘ„Éę„āī„É™„āļ„É†„ĀĆŚĻĺ„Ā§„ĀčśŹźś°ą„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„Āä„āä, SDK„Āę„ĀĮšĽ•šłč„Āģ„āĘ„Éę„āī„É™„āļ„É†„ĀĆŚģüŤ£Ö„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč.

  • Naive - ŚćėšłÄÁĄ¶ÁāĻŤß£„Āģťáć„Ā≠Śźą„āŹ„Āõ
  • GS - Gershberg-Saxon
  • GSPAT - Gershberg-Saxon for Phased Arrays of Transducers
  • LM - Levenberg-Marquardt
  • Greedy - Greedy algorithm and Brute-force search

„Āĺ„Āü, ŚźĄśČčś≥ē„ĀĮŤ®ąÁģóBackend„āíťĀł„ĀĻ„āč„āą„ĀÜ„Āę„Ā™„Ā£„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč. (Greedy„Āģ„ĀŅBackend„ĀģśĆáŚģö„ĀĮ„Ā™„ĀĄ.) SDK„Āę„ĀĮšĽ•šłč„ĀģBackend„ĀĆÁĒ®śĄŹ„Āē„āĆ„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč

  • NalgebraBackend - Nalgebra„āíšĹŅÁĒ®
  • CUDABackend - CUDA„āíšĹŅÁĒ®, GPU„ĀßŚģüŤ°Ć (RustÁČą„Āģ„ĀŅ)
  • ArrayFireBackend - ArrayFire„āíšĹŅÁĒ® (RustÁČą„Āģ„ĀŅ)

NOTE: CUDABackend„āĄArrayFireBackend„ĀĮťęėťÄüŚĆĖ„āíÁõģÁöĄ„Ā®„Āó„Ā¶„ĀĄ„āč„ĀĆ, „ĀĽ„Ā®„āď„Ā©„ĀģŚ†īŚźą, NalgebraBackend„ĀßŚćĀŚąÜ„Āß„Āā„āč. šĹŅÁĒ®śôā„ĀĮ, ŚŅÖ„Āö„Éô„É≥„ÉĀ„Éě„Éľ„āĮ„āíŚŹĖ„āč„Āď„Ā®.

śĆĮŚĻÖŚą∂ÁīĄ

ŚźĄ„āĘ„Éę„āī„É™„āļ„É†„ĀģŤ®ąÁģóÁĶźśěú„ĀģśĆĮŚĻÖ„ĀĮśúÄÁĶāÁöĄ„ĀęśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀĆŚáļŚäõ„Āß„Āć„āčÁĮĄŚõ≤„ĀęŚą∂ťôź„Āô„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč. „Āď„āĆ„ĀĮ„ā™„Éó„ā∑„Éß„É≥„ĀģEmissionConstraint„ĀßŚą∂Śĺ°„Āß„Āć, šĽ•šłč„Āģ4„Ā§„Āģ„ĀĄ„Āö„āĆ„Āč„āíśĆáŚģö„Āô„āčŚŅÖŤ¶Ā„ĀĆ„Āā„āč.

  • Normalize: śĆĮŚĻÖ„ĀģśúÄŚ§ßŚÄ§„Āß„Āô„ĀĻ„Ā¶„ĀģśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀģśĆĮŚĻÖ„āíŚČ≤„āä, Ť¶Źś†ľŚĆĖ„Āô„āč.
  • Uniform: „Āô„ĀĻ„Ā¶„ĀģśĆĮŚčēŚ≠ź„ĀģśĆĮŚĻÖ„āíśĆáŚģö„Āó„ĀüŚÄ§„Āę„Āô„āč.
  • Clamp: śĆĮŚĻÖ„āíśĆáŚģö„ĀģÁĮĄŚõ≤„Āę„āĮ„É©„É≥„Éó„Āô„āč.
  • Multiply: Ť¶Źś†ľŚĆĖŚĺĆ, śČÄŚģö„ĀģŚÄ§„āíšĻóÁģó„Āô„āč.
Found a bug? Edit this page on GitHub.

Naive

Source

ŚćėšłÄÁĄ¶ÁāĻŤß£„Āģťáć„Ā≠Śźą„āŹ„Āõ„Āę„āą„āčŚ§öÁĄ¶ÁāĻGain.

use autd3::prelude::*;
use autd3_gain_holo::{EmissionConstraint, NalgebraBackend, Pa, Naive, NaiveOption};
use std::sync::Arc;

fn main() {
let x1 = 0.;
let y1 = 0.;
let z1 = 0.;
let x2 = 0.;
let y2 = 0.;
let z2 = 0.;
let backend = Arc::new(NalgebraBackend::default());
let _ = 
Naive {
    foci: vec![
        (Point3::new(x1, y1, z1), 5e3 * Pa),
        (Point3::new(x2, y2, z2), 5e3 * Pa),
    ],
    option: NaiveOption {
        constraint: EmissionConstraint::Clamp(EmitIntensity::MIN, EmitIntensity::MAX),
        ..Default::default()
    },
    backend,
};
}
#include<autd3.hpp>
#include "autd3/gain/holo.hpp"

using namespace autd3;
using gain::holo::Pa;

int main() {
const auto x1 = 0.0;
const auto y1 = 0.0;
const auto z1 = 0.0;
const auto x2 = 0.0;
const auto y2 = 0.0;
const auto z2 = 0.0;
const auto backend = std::make_shared<gain::holo::NalgebraBackend>();
auto g = gain::holo::Naive(
    std::vector<std::pair<Point3, gain::holo::Amplitude>>{
        {Point3(x1, y1, z1), 5e3 * Pa},
        {Point3(x2, y2, z2), 5e3 * Pa},
    },
    gain::holo::NaiveOption{
        .constraint = gain::holo::EmissionConstraint::Clamp(
            std::numeric_limits<EmitIntensity>::min(),
            std::numeric_limits<EmitIntensity>::max()),
    },
    backend);
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp.Gain.Holo;

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
using static AUTD3Sharp.Units;
var x1 = 0.0f;
var y1 = 0.0f;
var z1 = 0.0f;
var x2 = 0.0f;
var y2 = 0.0f;
var z2 = 0.0f;
var backend = new NalgebraBackend();
new Naive(
    foci: [
             (new Point3(x1, y1, z1), 5e3f * Pa),
             (new Point3(x2, y2, z2), 5e3f * Pa)
    ],
    option: new NaiveOption
    {
        EmissionConstraint = EmissionConstraint.Clamp(EmitIntensity.Min, EmitIntensity.Max),
    },
    backend: backend
);

import numpy as np
from pyautd3 import EmitIntensity
from pyautd3.gain.holo import Naive, EmissionConstraint, NaiveOption, NalgebraBackend, Pa

x1 = 0.0
y1 = 0.0
z1 = 0.0
x2 = 0.0
y2 = 0.0
z2 = 0.0
backend = NalgebraBackend()
Naive(
    foci=[(np.array([x1, y1, z1]), 5e3 * Pa), (np.array([x2, y2, z2]), 5e3 * Pa)],
    option=NaiveOption(
        constraint=EmissionConstraint.Clamp(EmitIntensity.MIN, EmitIntensity.MAX),
    ),
    backend=backend,
)

GS

Source

Gershberg-Saxon, Marzo„āČ„ĀģŤęĖśĖá1„ĀęŚüļ„Ā•„ĀŹŚ§öÁĄ¶ÁāĻGain.

use autd3::prelude::*;
use autd3_gain_holo::{EmissionConstraint, NalgebraBackend, Pa, GS, GSOption};
use std::num::NonZeroUsize;
use std::sync::Arc;

fn main() {
let x1 = 0.;
let y1 = 0.;
let z1 = 0.;
let x2 = 0.;
let y2 = 0.;
let z2 = 0.;
let backend = Arc::new(NalgebraBackend::default());
let _ = 
GS {
    foci: vec![
        (Point3::new(x1, y1, z1), 5e3 * Pa),
        (Point3::new(x2, y2, z2), 5e3 * Pa),
    ],
    option: GSOption {
        repeat: NonZeroUsize::new(100).unwrap(),
        constraint: EmissionConstraint::Clamp(EmitIntensity::MIN, EmitIntensity::MAX),
        ..Default::default()
    },
    backend,
};
}
#include<autd3.hpp>
#include "autd3/gain/holo.hpp"

using namespace autd3;
using gain::holo::Pa;

int main() {
const auto x1 = 0.0;
const auto y1 = 0.0;
const auto z1 = 0.0;
const auto x2 = 0.0;
const auto y2 = 0.0;
const auto z2 = 0.0;
const auto backend = std::make_shared<gain::holo::NalgebraBackend>();
auto g = gain::holo::GS(
    std::vector<std::pair<Point3, gain::holo::Amplitude>>{
        {Point3(x1, y1, z1), 5e3 * Pa},
        {Point3(x2, y2, z2), 5e3 * Pa},
    },
    gain::holo::GSOption{
        .repeat = 100,
        .constraint = gain::holo::EmissionConstraint::Clamp(
            std::numeric_limits<EmitIntensity>::min(),
            std::numeric_limits<EmitIntensity>::max()),
    },
    backend);
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp.Gain.Holo;

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
using static AUTD3Sharp.Units;
var x1 = 0.0f;
var y1 = 0.0f;
var z1 = 0.0f;
var x2 = 0.0f;
var y2 = 0.0f;
var z2 = 0.0f;
var backend = new NalgebraBackend();
new GS(
    foci: [
             (new Point3(x1, y1, z1), 5e3f * Pa),
             (new Point3(x2, y2, z2), 5e3f * Pa)
    ],
    option: new GSOption
    {
        Repeat = 100,
        EmissionConstraint = EmissionConstraint.Clamp(EmitIntensity.Min, EmitIntensity.Max),
    },
    backend: backend
);

import numpy as np
from pyautd3 import EmitIntensity
from pyautd3.gain.holo import GS, EmissionConstraint, GSOption, NalgebraBackend, Pa

x1 = 0.0
y1 = 0.0
z1 = 0.0
x2 = 0.0
y2 = 0.0
z2 = 0.0
backend = NalgebraBackend()
GS(
    foci=[(np.array([x1, y1, z1]), 5e3 * Pa), (np.array([x2, y2, z2]), 5e3 * Pa)],
    option=GSOption(
        repeat=100,
        constraint=EmissionConstraint.Clamp(EmitIntensity.MIN, EmitIntensity.MAX),
    ),
    backend=backend,
)

repeat„ĀĮŚŹćŚĺ©Śõěśēį, „Éá„Éē„ā©„Éę„Éą„ĀĮšłäŤ®ė„ĀģťÄö„āä. „ÉĎ„É©„É°„Éľ„āŅ„ĀģŤ©≥Áīį„ĀĮŤęĖśĖá1„āíŚŹāÁÖß„Āē„āĆ„Āü„ĀĄ.

Marzo, Asier, and Bruce W. Drinkwater. ‚ÄúHolographic acoustic tweezers.‚ÄĚ Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences 116.1 (2019): 84-89.

GSPAT

Source

Gershberg-Saxon for Phased Arrays of Transducers, Plasencia„āČ„ĀģŤęĖśĖá1„ĀęŚüļ„Ā•„ĀŹŚ§öÁĄ¶ÁāĻGain.

use autd3::prelude::*;
use autd3_gain_holo::{EmissionConstraint, NalgebraBackend, Pa, GSPAT, GSPATOption};
use std::num::NonZeroUsize;
use std::sync::Arc;

fn main() {
let x1 = 0.;
let y1 = 0.;
let z1 = 0.;
let x2 = 0.;
let y2 = 0.;
let z2 = 0.;
let backend = Arc::new(NalgebraBackend::default());
let _ = 
GSPAT {
    foci: vec![
        (Point3::new(x1, y1, z1), 5e3 * Pa),
        (Point3::new(x2, y2, z2), 5e3 * Pa),
    ],
    option: GSPATOption {
        repeat: NonZeroUsize::new(100).unwrap(),
        constraint: EmissionConstraint::Clamp(EmitIntensity::MIN, EmitIntensity::MAX),
        ..Default::default()
    },
    backend,
};
}
#include<autd3.hpp>
#include "autd3/gain/holo.hpp"

using namespace autd3;
using gain::holo::Pa;

int main() {
const auto x1 = 0.0;
const auto y1 = 0.0;
const auto z1 = 0.0;
const auto x2 = 0.0;
const auto y2 = 0.0;
const auto z2 = 0.0;
const auto backend = std::make_shared<gain::holo::NalgebraBackend>();
auto g = gain::holo::GSPAT(
    std::vector<std::pair<Point3, gain::holo::Amplitude>>{
        {Point3(x1, y1, z1), 5e3 * Pa},
        {Point3(x2, y2, z2), 5e3 * Pa},
    },
    gain::holo::GSPATOption{
        .repeat = 100,
        .constraint = gain::holo::EmissionConstraint::Clamp(
            std::numeric_limits<EmitIntensity>::min(),
            std::numeric_limits<EmitIntensity>::max()),
    },
    backend);
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;

var y1 = 0.0f;
var z1 = 0.0f;

    option: new GSPATOption
    {

LM

Source

Levenberg-Marquardtś≥ē (LMś≥ē) „ĀęŚüļ„Ā•„ĀŹŚ§öÁĄ¶ÁāĻGain. LMś≥ē„ĀĮLevenberg1„Ā®Marquardt2„ĀßśŹźś°ą„Āē„āĆ„ĀüťĚěÁ∑öŚĹĘśúÄŚįŹšļĆšĻóŚēŹť°Ć„ĀģśúÄťĀ©ŚĆĖś≥ē, ŚģüŤ£Ö„ĀĮMadsen„Āģ„ÉÜ„ā≠„āĻ„Éą3„ĀęŚüļ„Ā•„ĀŹ.

use autd3::prelude::*;
use autd3_gain_holo::{EmissionConstraint, NalgebraBackend, Pa, LM, LMOption};
use std::num::NonZeroUsize;
use std::sync::Arc;

fn main() {
let x1 = 0.;
let y1 = 0.;
let z1 = 0.;
let x2 = 0.;
let y2 = 0.;
let z2 = 0.;
let backend = Arc::new(NalgebraBackend::default());
let _ = 
LM {
    foci: vec![
        (Point3::new(x1, y1, z1), 5e3 * Pa),
        (Point3::new(x2, y2, z2), 5e3 * Pa),
    ],
    option: LMOption {
        eps_1: 1e-8,
        eps_2: 1e-8,
        tau: 1e-3,
        k_max: NonZeroUsize::new(5).unwrap(),
        initial: vec![],
        constraint: EmissionConstraint::Clamp(EmitIntensity::MIN, EmitIntensity::MAX),
        ..Default::default()
    },
    backend,
};
}
#include<autd3.hpp>
#include "autd3/gain/holo.hpp"

using namespace autd3;
using gain::holo::Pa;

int main() {
const auto x1 = 0.0;
const auto y1 = 0.0;
const auto z1 = 0.0;
const auto x2 = 0.0;
const auto y2 = 0.0;
const auto z2 = 0.0;
const auto backend = std::make_shared<gain::holo::NalgebraBackend>();
auto g = gain::holo::LM(
    std::vector<std::pair<Point3, gain::holo::Amplitude>>{
        {Point3(x1, y1, z1), 5e3 * Pa},
        {Point3(x2, y2, z2), 5e3 * Pa},
    },
    gain::holo::LMOption{
        .eps_1 = 1e-8,
        .eps_2 = 1e-8,
        .tau = 1e-3,
        .k_max = 5,
        .initial = {},
        .constraint = gain::holo::EmissionConstraint::Clamp(
            std::numeric_limits<EmitIntensity>::min(),
            std::numeric_limits<EmitIntensity>::max()),
    },
    backend);
return 0; }

using AUTD3Sharp.Gain.Holo;

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
using static AUTD3Sharp.Units;
var x1 = 0.0f;
var y1 = 0.0f;
var z1 = 0.0f;
var x2 = 0.0f;
var y2 = 0.0f;
var z2 = 0.0f;
var backend = new NalgebraBackend();
new LM(
    foci: [
             (new Point3(x1, y1, z1), 5e3f * Pa),
             (new Point3(x2, y2, z2), 5e3f * Pa)
    ],
    option: new LMOption
    {
        Eps1 = 1e-8f,
        Eps2 = 1e-8f,
        Tau = 1e-3f,
        KMax = 5,
        Initial = [],
        EmissionConstraint = EmissionConstraint.Clamp(EmitIntensity.Min, EmitIntensity.Max),
    },
    backend: backend
);

import numpy as np
from pyautd3 import EmitIntensity
from pyautd3.gain.holo import LM, EmissionConstraint, LMOption, NalgebraBackend, Pa

x1 = 0.0
y1 = 0.0
z1 = 0.0
x2 = 0.0
y2 = 0.0
z2 = 0.0
backend = NalgebraBackend()
LM(
    foci=[(np.array([x1, y1, z1]), 5e3 * Pa), (np.array([x2, y2, z2]), 5e3 * Pa)],
    option=LMOption(
        eps_1=1e-8,
        eps_2=1e-8,
        tau=1e-3,
        k_max=5,
        initial = None,
        constraint=EmissionConstraint.Clamp(EmitIntensity.MIN, EmitIntensity.MAX),
    ),
    backend=backend,
)

ŚźĄ„ÉĎ„É©„É°„Éľ„āŅ„Āģ„Éá„Éē„ā©„Éę„Éą„ĀĮšłäŤ®ė„ĀģťÄö„āä. „ÉĎ„É©„É°„Éľ„āŅ„ĀģŤ©≥Áīį„ĀĮ„ÉÜ„ā≠„āĻ„Éą3„āíŚŹāÁÖß„Āē„āĆ„Āü„ĀĄ.

1

Levenberg, Kenneth. ‚ÄúA method for the solution of certain non-linear problems in least squares.‚ÄĚ Quarterly of applied mathematics 2.2 (1944): 164-168.

2

Marquardt, Donald W. ‚ÄúAn algorithm for least-squares estimation of nonlinear parameters.‚ÄĚ Journal of the society for Industrial and Applied Mathematics 11.2 (1963): 431-441.

3

Madsen, Kaj, Hans Bruun Nielsen, and Ole Tingleff. ‚ÄúMethods for non-linear least squares problems.‚ÄĚ (2004).

Greedy

Source

Greedy Algorithm with Brute-Force Search, ťąīśú®„āČ„ĀģŤęĖśĖá1„ĀęŚüļ„Ā•„ĀŹŚ§öÁĄ¶ÁāĻGain.

use autd3::prelude::*;
use autd3_gain_holo::{EmissionConstraint, Pa, Greedy, GreedyOption, Sphere};
use std::num::NonZeroU8;

fn main() {
let x1 = 0.;
let y1 = 0.;
let z1 = 0.;
let x2 = 0.;
let y2 = 0.;
let z2 = 0.;
let _ = 
Greedy::<Sphere> {
    foci: vec![
        (Point3::new(x1, y1, z1), 5e3 * Pa),
        (Point3::new(x2, y2, z2), 5e3 * Pa),
    ],
    option: GreedyOption {
        phase_div: NonZeroU8::new(16).unwrap(),
        constraint: EmissionConstraint::Uniform(EmitIntensity::MAX),
        ..Default::default()
    },
};
}
#include <autd3.hpp>
#include "autd3/gain/holo.hpp"

using namespace autd3;
using gain::holo::Pa;

int main() {
const auto x1 = 0.0;
const auto y1 = 0.0;
const auto z1 = 0.0;
const auto x2 = 0.0;
const auto y2 = 0.0;
const auto z2 = 0.0;
auto g = gain::holo::Greedy(
    std::vector<std::pair<Point3, gain::holo::Amplitude>>{
        {Point3(x1, y1, z1), 5e3 * Pa},
        {Point3(x2, y2, z2), 5e3 * Pa},
    },
    gain::holo::GreedyOption{
        .phase_div = 16,
        .constraint = gain::holo::EmissionConstraint::Uniform(
            std::numeric_limits<EmitIntensity>::max())});
  return 0;
}

using AUTD3Sharp.Gain.Holo;

using AUTD3Sharp;
using AUTD3Sharp.Utils;
using static AUTD3Sharp.Units;
var x1 = 0.0f;
var y1 = 0.0f;
var z1 = 0.0f;
var x2 = 0.0f;
var y2 = 0.0f;
var z2 = 0.0f;
new Greedy(
    foci: [
             (new Point3(x1, y1, z1), 5e3f * Pa),
             (new Point3(x2, y2, z2), 5e3f * Pa)
    ],
    option: new GreedyOption
    {
        PhaseDiv = 16,
        EmissionConstraint = EmissionConstraint.Uniform(EmitIntensity.Max),
    }
);

import numpy as np
from pyautd3 import EmitIntensity
from pyautd3.gain.holo import Greedy, EmissionConstraint, GreedyOption, Pa

x1 = 0.0
y1 = 0.0
z1 = 0.0
x2 = 0.0
y2 = 0.0
z2 = 0.0
Greedy(
    foci=[(np.array([x1, y1, z1]), 5e3 * Pa), (np.array([x2, y2, z2]), 5e3 * Pa)],
    option=GreedyOption(
        phase_div=16,
        constraint=EmissionConstraint.Uniform(EmitIntensity.MAX),
    ),
)

phase_div„ĀĮšĹćÁõł„ĀģťõĘśē£ŚĆĖś∑ĪŚļ¶, „Éá„Éē„ā©„Éę„Éą„ĀĮšłäŤ®ė„ĀģťÄö„āä. „ÉĎ„É©„É°„Éľ„āŅ„ĀģŤ©≥Áīį„ĀĮŤęĖśĖá1„āíŚŹāÁÖß„Āē„āĆ„Āü„ĀĄ.

1

Suzuki, Shun, et al. ‚ÄúRadiation Pressure Field Reconstruction for Ultrasound Midair Haptics by Greedy Algorithm with Brute-Force Search.‚ÄĚ IEEE Transactions on Haptics (2021).

Cache

Source

Cache„Āę„āą„Ā£„Ā¶Gain„ĀģŤ®ąÁģóÁĶźśěú„āí„ā≠„É£„ÉÉ„ā∑„É•„Āô„āčGain„āíÁĒüśąź„Āß„Āć„āč.

use autd3::prelude::*;
use autd3::gain::Cache;

fn main() {
let _ = 
Cache::new(Null::new());
